programme.desc: Oscar returns from his vacation with mixed emotions on whether or not he wants to be a part of the office. Meanwhile, Andy takes advantage of recent events to get closer to Michael. Jim turns to Karen and Pam for help to stage a prank on a new target.

programme.title: The Office: Ben Franklin
programme.desc: Acting on bad advice he received from his friend Todd Packer, Michael brings two 'adult' performers into the office in honour of Phyllis's wedding shower. Meanwhile, Karen confronts Pam about her past with Jim.

programme.title: The Office: Phyllis' Wedding
programme.desc: Phyllis regrets giving Michael an important job at her wedding after several embarrassing moments. Pam has flashbacks of her own wedding planning when she sees Phyllis's decorations. Meanwhile, Dwight is determined to catch wedding crashers.

programme.title: The Office: Business School
programme.desc: Ryan invites Michael to be a guest speaker at his business school. Meanwhile, Dwight battles a bat that gets loose in the office while Pam invites co-workers to her first art show.

programme.title: The Office: Cocktails
programme.desc: Michael and Jan go public with their relationship during a party at their CFO's home. At the party, Jim meets Karen's ex. Meanwhile, the rest of the office decides to go to happy hour for drinks.

programme.title: The Office: The Negotiation
programme.desc: Darryl decides to meet with Michael to negotiate a pay increase. Meanwhile, Jim deals with the consequences of Pam's confession to Roy.

programme.title: The Office: Safety Training
programme.desc: Andy returns to the office after several weeks of anger management training, determined to make a fresh start with all the Dunder-Mifflin employees. On safety training day, Michael and Dwight try to illuminate the true dangers of the workplace.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Hair of the Dog
programme.desc: With no forensic evidence found at a murder scene, investigators were baffled. But they suspected that the victim's dog had witnessed the crime.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Pastoral Care
programme.desc: The body of a female prison guard shows up in a landfill and investigators suspect the hundreds of prisoners in the facility where she worked.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Shot in the Dark
programme.desc: A woman is found dead of a gunshot wound and police conclude that she was murdered by her husband. Forensic scientists were able to piece together the clues and determine what really happened.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Saving Face
programme.desc: A woman disappears without a trace and it appears that she was either kidnapped or murdered. Police concern heightens when they learn that two other women have vanished under similar circumstances.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Stake-Out
programme.desc: When a banker's wife is kidnapped, officers scour the bank, and records for clues. They soon realize how much evidence can be found around a normal office.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Over and Out
programme.desc: A pipe bomb explodes in a house, killing a man and wounding his mother. Police use a lot number on a battery and a mailing label to track down the bomber, and determine his motive.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Duelling Confessions

programme.title: Moonshiners: Wrong Side of the Law
programme.desc: Legal shiner Tim finds himself on the wrong side of the law after son JT spots an agent near a backwoods still site. Mike designs a unique still to make high dollar shine. Mark and Digger make an in-town run and Josh discovers what bears do in the woods.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Popcorn's Secret Stash
programme.desc: Ten years after Popcorn Sutton's death, his widow reveals a clue that could lead Mark and Digger to a hidden stash. Mike must gin up his brandy game to pay off his debt to Mark and Digger. Donnie and Teresa build a secret still site in a Kentucky cave.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Burden of Proof
programme.desc: Booted off his backwoods still site, Josh turns to his stockcar racing roots to invent a whole new way of making moonshine. Old-timer JB comes to the rescue as Mark and Digger fall short on high proof run. Mark Rogers faces a close encounter with the law.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Breaking the Laws
programme.desc: When their still site gets compromised, Virginia shiners Henry and Kenny enlist the help of bootlegging legend, Amos Law. To pay off his debt to Mark and Digger, Mike runs his still to the breaking point. Tim doubles down on JT and Tickle's double rye.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Moonshiner's Apprentice
programme.desc: Mark and Digger's new apprentice proves talent can't be taught. Josh tempts fate converting a new racecar trailer into a mobile moonshining masterpiece. Mark Rogers enlists the help of a retired lawman to bootleg 30 gallons of shine into a music festival.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Hillbilly Ingenuity
programme.desc: As Josh gets set to fire up his hidden mobile still at a biker rally, law enforcement gets wise to his plan. Mark and Digger's backwoods potato vodka hits a sweet spot. Short on payback cash, Mike and Daniel invent a new way to get out of debt.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Bootlegger's Bounty
programme.desc: Tracking down an old-time bootlegger, Mark and Digger uncover treasures Popcorn Sutton left behind. Deep in debt, Mike and Daniel engineer a split pot still to upgrade their shine, and its price. Patti and David convert pontoons into a bayou still site.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Full Throttle Throwdown
programme.desc: Moonshiner Josh Owens puts the pedal to the metal on the Carolina Dragway.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Mobile Moonshine Madness
programme.desc: Josh debuts his mobile still at a North Carolina biker rally. In the Great Smoky Mountains, Mike gets burned by a taste of his own medicine. There's a reason Franklin County, VA is the Moonshine Capital of America, and someone there is above the Laws.

programme.title: Moonshiners: 100 Proof Heritage
programme.desc: Mark and Digger's first run of barrel-aged bourbon gets interrupted by a bear. Scaling up Tickle's double rye tests Tim's backwoods engineering. Mark Rogers builds a malt house to make corn whiskey. In Kentucky, Donnie and Theresa come up short on shine.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Whiskey Deception
programme.desc: When a dead drop goes sideways, Mark Rogers deploys backwoods justice to straighten out a thief. Kelly's massive sorghum haul puts Mark and Digger's pot stills to the test. Mike and Daniel's clear apple pie has buyers calling from across county lines.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Tickle on the Brink
programme.desc: A year behind bars, Tickle transfers to Culpeper County, and Tim concocts a plan to get him out. Breaking the shiner code can come at a steep price for Mark Rogers. Mark & Digger's handmade vodka is on a hot streak until a cold snap put’s profits at risk.

programme.title: Four Weddings: ...and a Thousand Cranes
programme.desc: Lori has hung a thousand origami cranes inside an intimate flower shop and Rita rocks a pink leopard print dress.

programme.title: Four Weddings: ...and a Nail in the Head
programme.desc: Firecrackers amaze the crowd at Diana's travel themed wedding, while Melea's theme highlights her road trip romance. Thunder and lightning give light to Nicole's purple nuptials while Leila sparkles with rhinestones and a bar made of ice.

programme.title: 90 Day Fiancé: What Am I Worth to You?
programme.desc: Anny is frustrated with Robert's promised shopping spree. Tania and Syngin disagree on their future plans. Anna feels Mursel is asking too much from her. Emily goes into labour, but there are complications. Then, meet new couple Mike and Natalie.

programme.title: 90 Day Fiancé: Tiffany and Ronald: Our Journey So Far
programme.desc: A look back at the highs and lows of Tiffany and Ronald's journey.

programme.desc: Anny is frustrated with Robert's promised shopping spree. Tania and Syngin disagree on their future plans. Anna feels Mursel is asking too much from her. Emily goes into labor, but there are complications. Then, meet new couple Mike and Natalie.

programme.desc: The Martones are a loud, fun-loving Italian family from Long Island. Sisters Lexi, a talented nail artist, and Bria, a hair colourist/makeup artist, run Salon Martone while juggling family dynamics, over the top clients, and their own relationships.

programme.title: 90 Day Fiancé: Tiffany and Ronald: Our Journey So Far

programme.title: Unpolished: Meet the Martones
programme.desc: The Martones are a loud, fun-loving Italian family from Long Island. Sisters Lexi, a talented nail artist, and Bria, a hair colourist/makeup artist, run Salon Martone while juggling family dynamics, over the top clients, and their own relationships.

programme.title: Return to Amish: Mary's Story
programme.desc: Archival footage and new interviews with those that know 'Return to Amish' fan favorite Mary Schmucker best. A fresh perspective on her journey on the show, plus a recap of the events that led to Mary's shunning from the Amish church.

programme.title: Return to Amish: Abe's Story
programme.desc: Abe Schmucker comes from a well-known Amish family but converted to the English lifestyle, leaving the community he had been a part of his entire life. New interviews with family and friends document his journey from an Amish to an English man.

programme.title: Sweet Home Sextuplets: We Survived a Year ... Barely
programme.desc: Courtney tackles planning the sextuplets' first birthday party, but taking care of six babies threatens to overwhelm her. The Waldrops struggle with a big decision as they realize their house will not accommodate a family of eleven.

programme.title: Sweet Home Sextuplets: Christmas Miracles and Meltdowns
programme.desc: It's Christmas and the first with the sextuplets at home. Courtney and Eric disagree on whether to sell their house and land while trying to continue their family traditions. The boys put their parents to the test when they want to keep a puppy.

programme.title: Counting On: The Great Duggar Campout
programme.desc: Jinger and Jeremy go house hunting in L.A. but with pricier real estate and small square footage, they may not be able to find the perfect place. Meanwhile in Arkansas, the family is going camping. Later at dinner, one couple makes a special announcement.

programme.title: Welcome to Plathville: Starving for Independence
programme.desc: In order to avoid more tension in the family, Kim allows Moriah to go to San Francisco with Olivia. From the moment they land Moriah quickly realizes she's a long way from south Georgia. Ethan finds creative ways to pass the time while Olivia is gone.

programme.title: Long Island Medium: Celebrity Spirit
programme.desc: 'The Big Bang Theory's' Jim Parsons and his sister get a reading. Then, Susan Lucci welcomes Theresa into her home. Later, Theresa channels spirit for 'Sopranos' star Jamie Lynn Sigler, and 'Scandal's' Katie Lowes travels to Long Island for a reading.

programme.title: Long Island Medium: An MRI For Larry
programme.desc: While in Los Angeles, Theresa does a reading for 'Scandal' star Guillermo Diaz. Theresa also channels for a woman who believes she has the gift as well.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER: Never Say Die
programme.desc: A doctor struggles with the decision to revive an older patient after prolonged CPR. Two nurses encounter a stabbing victim on the street and try to save him. A doctor on a cruise ship finds that her dream job has become a nightmare.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER: Deep Trouble
programme.desc: An off-duty ER physician diagnoses his own critical illness en route to the hospital. A visiting ER doctor is threatened while working at a remote hospital. A patient with ominous symptoms returns to the ER multiple times after a trip.

programme.title: Gypsy Sisters: The Queen of All Cons
programme.desc: Nettie and Kayla get in a huge fight over who will get to plan Mellie's wedding. Kayla and her husband fight over how to raise their teenage daughter.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Baddie Winkle
programme.desc: Rob, Chanel and Sterling are joined by the coolest granny in the game, Baddie Winkle, who teaches us how to stay young in 'fountain of Baddie.'

programme.desc: Singer-songwriter Elle King joins Rob, Steelo, and Chanel to get dumped in 'Wrecked Exes', get past the bouncer in 'Bar Bargin', and to lose a few teeth in 'Chiplets'.

programme.desc: Rob, Sterling and Chanel take a much needed 'Karate Break,' try to figure out what's wrong with some highly 'Defective Pets' and play a classic game of 'Heads or Tails.'

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Jarvis Landry

programme.title: The Curse of Civil War Gold: Diving Deeper: Debris Field of Dreams
programme.desc: For Kevin Dykstra and his team, an eight-year quest to find a legendary boxcar at the bottom of Lake Michigan has now become a battle against nature itself.

programme.title: Lost Gold of World War II: Death on the Mountain
programme.desc: A team of Americans attempts to solve one of the great mysteries of World War II. With the help of an eyewitness, they explore a mountain in the Philippines where Japanese general Yamashita is believed to have buried a vast treasure during the war.

programme.title: Lost Gold of World War II: X Marks the Spot
programme.desc: Excavation is put on hold when the team unearths a possible water trap. The team conducts a LiDAR scan to find another way into the mountain.

programme.title: Lost Gold of World War II: Dead Giveaway
programme.desc: The team uncover a potential booby trap, and their first hint of treasure in a cave that may have been a headquarters for General Yamashita during the war.

programme.title: Lost Gold of World War II: What Lies Beneath
programme.desc: The team triggers a possible water trap in the cave and is forced to stop digging. Martin believes the story rock indicates a tunnel behind a waterfall and the team brings in a Navy diver to explore the plunge pools and search for an entrance.

programme.title: Lost Gold of World War II: The Backdoor
programme.desc: Unable to find a tunnel at the waterfall, the team is guided by an animal marker to a boulder carved in the shape of a turtle. Following the direction of the turtle head, the team discovers a golden lily symbol indicating a secret backdoor entrance.

programme.title: Lost Gold of World War II: Nazi Concrete
programme.desc: The team believes there's a secret backdoor entrance to the mountain behind a unique formation of rocks. After battling a typhoon and possible Nazi concrete, they find a void 40-foot below.

programme.title: Lost Gold of World War II: Blood and Conspiracy
programme.desc: Bingo uncovers a possible link to a CIA conspiracy when the team zeroes in on a tunnel that may be part of a treasure labyrinth, and learn that part of Ferdinand Marcos' fortune may have been stolen from Yamashita's Treasure.

programme.title: Lost Gold of World War II: Tunnel Found
programme.desc: As the team moves mountains to clear the last obstacles, Peter meets with a man who warns of the dangers of searching for Yamashita's treasure.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Assignment of the Year

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Called in Dead
programme.desc: A friend of Nadia's leads the intelligence unit to a huge heroin bust. Unfortunately, this bust results in Olinksy arriving home to find his wife being held hostage.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: We Don't Work Together Anymore
programme.desc: Lindsay has her first case with the task force and realizes she needs to call on Voight and her Intelligence Unit to assist. Meanwhile, Burgess is back at work and delegated to desk duty, allowing Platt to partner up with Roman.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Disco Bob
programme.desc: Bob Ruzek is the first to arrive at the scene of a double murder. Intelligence arrives to take over the investigation and tensions rise when Bob must hand over the case to his son and Voight. Lindsay heads off to Bolivia for a case.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: A Little Devil Complex
programme.desc: Antonio and his sister Gabriela go to the office of Elliot Gish, the man they believe started the fire that killed Shay. Intelligence puts pressure on Gish to confess. Lindsay approaches Voight about returning to Intelligence.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Erin's Mom
programme.desc: Bunny comes to Lindsay concerned about a suspicious repeat customer at her husband's rental company. This lead brings info into a case which robbery-homicide has been working for months. Voight doesn't trust Bunny's motive for the tip.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: What Do You Do?
programme.desc: Burgess and Roman tackle a dangerous smuggling operation with no means to defend themselves or call for help. Meanwhile, it's a slow day in intelligence and they are spending the day receiving taser certification.

programme.title: UFOs: The Lost Evidence: American UFO Coverups
programme.desc: Recent news of the Pentagon’s secret UFO program may lead to shocking evidence of what the military has hidden for decades.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Twin Suns: The Alien Mysteries
programme.desc: Planets that orbit two suns instead of one might be deadly hell worlds, but new discoveries reveal that sci-fi star systems with binary stars might be optimal places for alien life.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Universe's Strangest Places
programme.desc: New discoveries are revealing what happens in the most remote corners of the universe, and reveals some of the universe's strangest places.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Battle of the Dark Universe
programme.desc: Dark matter and dark energy compete for control of the cosmos; the winner will determine the fate of the universe. New discoveries might reveal which force will emerge victorious.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Edge of the Solar System
programme.desc: Giant magnetic bubbles millions of miles wide, bizarre invisible matter, and a death star tearing through bands of icy comets, flinging them into violent orbits. All this and more could be inside our cosmic backyard, and effecting our lives on Earth.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: The Interstellar Mysteries
programme.desc: New discoveries reveal that interstellar space, the space between the universe's stars, is not empty and unremarkable as previously thought, but full of weird objects and strange phenomena that might hold the darkest secrets of our cosmos.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Battle of the Dark Universe
programme.desc: Dark matter and dark energy compete for control of the cosmos; the winner will determine the fate of the universe. New discoveries might reveal which force will emerge victorious.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Mystery of Planet 9
programme.desc: Scientists have discovered a mysterious ninth planet on the very edge of our solar system. Ten times the size of Earth, this strange world could have moons with extraterrestrial life.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Nightmares of Neutron Stars
programme.desc: Neutron stars are strange and violent phenomena which defy the laws of physics, and new discoveries show that these bizarre nightmares are potentially far deadlier than we ever thought, with the power to destroy planets and even other stars.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Volcanoes
programme.desc: From our nearest planetary neighbour to tiny moons billions of miles away, today we are discovering volcanoes on alien worlds.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Planets From Hell
programme.desc: Over the last twenty years we have discovered an extraordinary zoo of planetary nightmares outside our own solar system, all of them truly wild worlds, a collection of monsters. Discussing if all new planets are planets from hell.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Monster Black Hole
programme.desc: Black holes are the least understood places in the universe, where the rules of physics collapse. We go inside the supermassive black hole in the center of the Milky Way to uncover terrifying secrets about parallel universes, wormholes, and space-time.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Strange Lives of Dwarf Planets
programme.desc: Our solar system is home to hundreds of strange, tiny worlds called dwarf planets, and new discoveries reveal the secrets of these mysterious places.

programme.title: Secret Nazi Ruins: Hitler's Forbidden Island
programme.desc: New discoveries on a strange fortified island reveal the terrifying truth behind Hitler's secret plan to win World War II at all costs, and using the latest science and tech, experts investigate what really happened here.

programme.title: Secret Nazi Ruins: Conspiracy on Death Island
programme.desc: A strange, abandoned mansion on a remote island is central to countless conspiracy theories, and new discoveries reveal if this eerie site was a secret Nazi base intended for a sinister mission.

programme.title: Secret Nazi Ruins: Hitler's Invisible City
programme.desc: As the Soviet Army pushes the Nazis out of Poland, they discover a massive city of over a thousand buildings that was unknown to the Allies, and using the latest science, experts reveal how Hitler was able to keep this sinister place hidden for so long.

programme.title: Secret Nazi Ruins: The Doomsday Castle
programme.desc: An abandoned eerie structure in France could have doomed the Allies in World War II, and new discoveries at this mysterious site reveal the truth behind top-secret Nazi plans to unleash apocalyptic destruction.

programme.title: Secret Nazi Ruins: The Devil's Lair
programme.desc: When a top-secret Nazi base is discovered in France decades after the war ends, experts use cutting-edge tech to reveal the secrets of this deadly compound; what they find could change everything we know about D-Day and the last stand of the Nazi regime.

programme.title: Secret Nazi Ruins: Mystery of the Nazi Nukes
programme.desc: When a secret bunker and a vast network of tunnels are discovered after World War II, experts use cutting-edge tech to uncover if the high levels of radiation in the area could be connected to a classified Nazi nuclear program.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Sea Fortress of Doom
programme.desc: A terrifying sea fortress, a highway in the Amazon that suddenly vanishes, and a mysterious structure in the shadow of the Statue of Liberty are deserted engineering projects, and new discoveries reveal how they were built and why they were abandoned.

programme.title: Dallas SWAT
programme.desc: Memorial Day weekend erupts when SWAT is called in to subdue a home intruder, whose startling method of entry leaves the team scratching their heads. An alleged heroin dealer is scoped out by an officer who's on a mission to put him out of business.

programme.title: Dallas SWAT
programme.desc: When Dallas patrol officers respond to a disturbance call, they find an armed parole violator intent on not returning to jail. The suspect fires at police and barricades himself in a bathroom. A SWAT negotiator is called in to talk the man out safely.

programme.desc: Central Prison in Raleigh, is the first stop for all of North Carolina's male felons with sentences of 20 years or longer. Today, Central is a modern state-of-the-art prison, but it began as a dark dungeon built nearly 120 years ago.

programme.title: The Big House: Maze Prison
programme.desc: The Maze Prison held Catholic and Protestant prisoners, along with paramilitary groups.

programme.title: The Big House: Folsom
programme.desc: An inside-the-walls look at the violent history of Folsom Prison, which opened in 1880.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: Let Her Rot

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: Poisoned by Love
programme.desc: Norma Hawkins grew up in fear of her mother, Shirley Allen. For years, Norma watched in horror while Shirley's anger destroyed those closest to her. But when people started dying, Norma had to find the courage to turn in her own mother to police.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: I Have To Do The Right Thing
programme.desc: When Tim Kreider discovered proof that his son, Alec, was responsible for a horrific crime, he knew what the right thing to do was.

programme.title: 48 Hours on ID: NCIS: Road Map to Murder
programme.desc: Navy sailor Cory Allen Voss was shot five times in the chest outside a Virginia bank. His wife became the main suspect when it was discovered she led a double life. It was a map to the murder scene that would crack this case wide open.

programme.title: The Devil Speaks: Buried at the Ranch
programme.desc: In Arlington, Texas, Michael Humphreys and Sandra Walton are brutally gunned down. Detectives don't know who the intended victim was but when they discover recordings of phone conversations with one of the victims, they get the break they need.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Without A Trace
programme.desc: In 1984 ten-year-old Kevin Collins disappears on his way home and the city of San Francisco is galvanized in an effort to find him. With few leads to go on, Kevin's case sheds light on hundreds of other kids who have vanished without a trace in the U.S.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Killing Field
programme.desc: The parents of a young South Carolina couple are terrified when they go missing in 2016. Detectives find a clue that leads to strange storage container in the middle of 95 acres. What's inside unlocks secrets of a monster hiding in plain sight.

programme.title: The Devil Speaks: Buried at the Ranch
programme.desc: In Arlington, Texas, Michael Humphreys and Sandra Walton are brutally gunned down. Detectives don't know who the intended victim was but when they discover recordings of phone conversations with one of the victims, they get the break they need.

programme.desc: The parents of a young South Carolina couple are terrified when they go missing in 2016. Detectives find a clue that leads to strange storage container in the middle of 95 acres. What's inside unlocks secrets of a monster hiding in plain sight.

programme.title: 48 Hours on ID: NCIS: Road Map to Murder
programme.desc: Navy sailor Cory Allen Voss was shot five times in the chest outside a Virginia bank. His wife became the main suspect when it was discovered she led a double life. It was a map to the murder scene that would crack this case wide open.

programme.title: Home Alone: Inheriting Evil
programme.desc: CeCe Coffee is a Southern Belle with a beautiful home but very little home security. In a bizarre case of mistaken identity, she falls prey to a brutal home invasion that will force her to think on her feet if she wants to stay alive.

programme.title: Home Alone: The Doorbell Rang Twice
programme.desc: Newlyweds Kristi and Jim Newman have their Christian beliefs tested to the limit when they come face to face with three masked men in their home. The intruders aren't just here to rob them, they're here to break their souls.

programme.title: Welcome to Murdertown: Out of the Ashes
programme.desc: Patricia Mills is killed in a house fire in Goliad, Texas. Her sister, suspicious the fire is deliberate, investigates. It takes 10 years to break the silence but the surprising culprit is finally trapped: the fire was arson, Patricia was murdered.

programme.title: Welcome to Murdertown: Silver Peak's Secret
programme.desc: Charlie Kinkel goes missing in a remote Nevada mining town. His wife Trayce investigates but is shunned by locals. When a body is discovered, detectives break down the silence to reveal Charlie's murder was a tragic case of misplaced suspicion.

programme.title: Welcome to Murdertown: Buried Deep
programme.desc: 23-year-old Sherry Leighty disappears from Altoona, PA, leaving her three small children behind. After a 13 year search her sister discovers the rumor she skipped town with a new boyfriend is a lie and people close to Sherry have been hiding a secret.

programme.title: 48 Hours Mystery: The Law & Mrs. Shelton
programme.desc: Why are so many people afraid of Texas lawyer Catherine Shelton? A story of betrayal.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Death on the Hudson
programme.desc: When Vincent Viafore drowned while kayaking on the Hudson with fiancée Angelika Graswald, police believed it was an accident. Then, after 11 hours of questioning Angelika, they charged her with second degree murder. Peter Van Sant reports.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Serial Confessions
programme.desc: Watch and hear the shocking confession of a real estate agent turned serial killer and a stunning rescue video of a woman held hostage in a shipping container.

programme.title: Forbidden: Dying for Love: Married With Secrets
programme.desc: The dark past of a college student's new husband rears its ugly head and ends in a double homicide.

programme.title: Forbidden: Dying for Love: Hell's Angel
programme.desc: When lonely teen Meagan Grunwald meets handsome 26-year-old felon Angel Garcia, it's love at first sight. But their whirlwind romance spirals into a hurricane of passion that leaves innocence destroyed and a trail of death and devastation in its path.

programme.title: Forbidden: Dying for Love: The Sum of Love
programme.desc: A friendship between a math teacher and assistant principal turns into a connection far deeper. But when a possessive estranged husband threatens their relationship and their safety, the pair take drastic measures to protect themselves against him.

programme.title: Forbidden: Dying for Love: Be My Savior
programme.desc: A teenage girl forbidden by her parents to date is swept off her feet by an older man. They vow to keep their whirlwind romance secret at all costs but when an unplanned pregnancy threatens to derail their plans, they take drastic action.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Desert War
programme.desc: The war that's encompassed the globe takes root in Africa. An ambitious Mussolini expands the war into North Africa; he sends ill-prepared soldiers, and forces Hitler to come to his ally's aid.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Final Victory
programme.desc: The provoking thoughts behind some of the war's most tragic events are shared as the war in the Pacific nears its violent end.

programme.title: World War II in Color: The Island War
programme.desc: By the spring of 1943, the Pacific war had reached a turning point. The United States had stopped the Japanese advance, now it launched a two-pronged attack to drive it back. To achieve this, the U.S. Navy had to pioneer new forms of warfare.

programme.title: World War II in Color: Victory in the Pacific
programme.desc: By the beginning of 1945, Japan's situation was desperate. Its navy and naval air power had effectively ceased to exist, while U.S. carriers and amphibious forces roamed at will across the Pacific Ocean, attacking Japanese-occupied islands.

programme.title: World War II in Color: Closing the Ring
programme.desc: By late summer 1944, the Allied forces in north-west Europe were thrusting towards the German border. Paris and Antwerp were liberated, but then supply problems brought the advance to a halt. Meanwhile, Stalin had halted his main thrust towards Berlin.

programme.title: World War II in Color: Overlord
programme.desc: By early 1944, Hitler faced a new threat. In the West, Allied preparations to invade northwest France were coming to a climax. It was an attack he had long been expecting. His problem was knowing when and where it would come.

programme.title: World War II in Color: Turning the Tide
programme.desc: As WWII erupted, there was a race to develop new weapons and ways to wage war. Both the Allies and the Germans were searching for something that would give them a knockout blow and bring the war to a quick end.

programme.title: World War II in Color: The Soviet Steamroller
programme.desc: By mid-1943, Hitler was on the run. The reality of a war on two fronts had caught up with him. In the West an Allied assault on Italy threatened his southern flank. In the East, exhausted German troops were fighting against the Soviet military machine.

programme.title: World War II in Color: Overlord
programme.desc: By early 1944, Hitler faced a new threat. In the West, Allied preparations to invade northwest France were coming to a climax. It was an attack he had long been expecting. His problem was knowing when and where it would come.

programme.title: World War II in Color: Turning the Tide
programme.desc: As WWII erupted, there was a race to develop new weapons and ways to wage war. Both the Allies and the Germans were searching for something that would give them a knockout blow and bring the war to a quick end.

programme.title: World War II in Color: The Soviet Steamroller
programme.desc: By mid-1943, Hitler was on the run. The reality of a war on two fronts had caught up with him. In the West an Allied assault on Italy threatened his southern flank. In the East, exhausted German troops were fighting against the Soviet military machine.

programme.title: World War II in Color: Closing the Ring
programme.desc: By late summer 1944, the Allied forces in north-west Europe were thrusting towards the German border. Paris and Antwerp were liberated, but then supply problems brought the advance to a halt. Meanwhile, Stalin had halted his main thrust towards Berlin.

programme.title: World War II in Color: Victory in the Pacific
programme.desc: By the beginning of 1945, Japan's situation was desperate. Its navy and naval air power had effectively ceased to exist, while U.S. carriers and amphibious forces roamed at will across the Pacific Ocean, attacking Japanese-occupied islands.

programme.title: World War II in Color: The Island War
programme.desc: By the spring of 1943, the Pacific war had reached a turning point. The United States had stopped the Japanese advance, now it launched a two-pronged attack to drive it back. To achieve this, the U.S. Navy had to pioneer new forms of warfare.

programme.title: World War II in Color: The Gathering Storm
programme.desc: On September 1st 1939, the most destructive war the world has ever known began as German troops invaded Poland. By the time it ended six years later, more than 70 million people would be killed and whole continents devastated.

programme.title: World War II in Color: Lightning War
programme.desc: Hitler's armed forces took just four weeks to conquer Poland. Their opponent was not only outnumbered both in men and weapons, but facing a new type of warfare - Lightning War or Blitzkrieg - for which it was totally unprepared.

programme.title: World War II in Color: Britain at Bay
programme.desc: By the end of June 1940, Hitler was victorious in Western Europe. Nazi Germany now controlled Denmark, Norway, the Netherlands, Belgium and France. Only Britain remained defiant. But the Fuehrer was certain that it could not hold out for long.

programme.title: World War II in Color: Hitler Strikes East
programme.desc: By the autumn of 1940, Hitler's forces were supreme in Western Europe. Britain remained undefeated but the country was isolated and Hitler no longer considered it a threat. The Fuhrer was ready for his greatest gamble - Operation Barbarossa.

programme.title: World War II in Color: Red Sun Rampant
programme.desc: On December 7th 1941, WWII changed dramatically as Japanese planes swooped in for a surprise attack on the U.S. Pacific Fleet in Pearl Harbour. A conflict that had been fought almost entirely in Europe was now to be fought worldwide.

programme.title: World War II in Color: The Mediterranean and North Africa
programme.desc: Italy's dictator Benito Mussolini dreamt of recreating the Roman Empire. The Mediterranean would become Italy's lake with a great new colonial empire on its southern shore including British-controlled Egypt and Sudan.

programme.title: Apocalypse: Hitler
programme.desc: See how Hitler succeeded in conquering Germany. Nothing predestines this mediocre student and failed artist to become dictator of Germany the Führer.

programme.title: Apocalypse: Hitler
programme.desc: 1929. Germany, harshly affected by the worldwide economic crisis, is sinking into despair. Bloody street fighting between Nazis and Communists is raging. Fear of the 'Red peril' will push millions of voters into Hitler's arms. Democracy is at risk.

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Bin Laden: A Terrorist Mastermind
programme.desc: See how Osama bin Laden's journey unfolds from his roots as a privileged young Saudi boy to becoming the formidable leader of al-Qaeda, and his lifetime commitment to violent jihad against the West. This resulted in the horrific 9/11 attacks in 2001.

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Saddam: The Butcher of Baghdad
programme.desc: The story of Saddam Hussein, the sadistic tyrant who ruled Iraq with an utter contempt for humanity for 23 years, a man whose cruelty knows no limits and who'll stop at nothing to achieve the power of life and death over millions of people.

programme.title: Dennis by Dennis Basso

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: A Family Cabin Fit for a King
programme.desc: The team has $50,000 to renovate a camp that's four-times the size their usual builds. After a series of delays, the crew needs an extension on their deadline. The cabin gets a complete exterior and interior facelift including an outdoor checkerboard.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: A Family Gathering Place
programme.desc: Chase and his team take on a project on McGrath Pond in Oakland, ME, that has been empty for 15 years. Stephanie bought this place from her father and promised him she would fix it up.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: A Cabin for the YMCA
programme.desc: The Kennebec Valley YMCA in Augusta, Maine needs a new play structure and the Cabin Masters know just the crew for the job! Ryan decides to build a workshop for Chase. The team works feverishly to finish both projects before everything freezes over.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: A Dream Come True
programme.desc: A couple with five children calls on the Cabin Masters to take their newly purchased camp on David Pond and turn it into a family vacation cabin that will serve as a central part of their lives for generations to come.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Old Stagecoach Inn
programme.desc: Hosts Mike & Robert salvage a house previously damaged by a tornado near Abingdon, VA. Key items include floors, doors, and a complete staircase. While at the warehouse, Mike makes a commissioned desk for a child from a balance beam.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Return to Delaware
programme.desc: The team faces cold winter weather as they attempt to quickly salvage as much as possible from an old church in Laurel, DE. They remove large stained glass, ceiling tiles, and doors. Later, a build shapes up to look like an outhouse.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Return to Jamestown, NY
programme.desc: The Dawgs return to Jamestown, NY, for their second go at salvaging a home that's been expanded to create a 26,000-square-foot Moose Lodge. The mixed architecture turns over an array of treasures, including neon lights and ornate roofing tiles.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Bluefield House
programme.desc: The crew deliver a large lamppost that will serve as the focal point of a new community space. Before taking on this project, the team visits the Bluefield House in West Virginia to find classic commodities needed to restock the warehouse.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Hylton Victorian
programme.desc: The Black Dog Salvage team saves parts of an old Victorian-style farmhouse in Laurel Forks, VA.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: C&O Railway
programme.desc: The team travels to Clifton Forge, Virginia, to conquer C&O Railway's vast repair space. They work to salvage the steam engine repair plant by saving railway bases and corrugated glass. Later, they take apart a baby grand piano.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: St. Andrews Church Spires
programme.desc: The Dawgs help save copper elements from the St. Andrews Catholic Church spires in Roanoke, VA. The guys also bring in an expert to learn more about a large lithograph from a previous salvage.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Return to Cap Centre
programme.desc: The crew take a second stab at the Boulevard at Capital Centre. This time, they bring home finds from a Japanese restaurant, a bank and a spa, including shoji screens and bullet-resistant plexiglass. Back home they complete a build for a dear friend.

programme.desc: The Hatmakers are on a hunt for a fixer upper house in Buda, Texas.

programme.title: My Big Family Renovation: First Floor Fixes
programme.desc: This family of seven is getting settled in their new farmhouse.

programme.title: My Big Family Renovation: Attic Transformation
programme.desc: Jen and Brandon tackle the upstairs attic, converting a small room and unused storage space into three unique bedrooms for their middle kids Ben, Caleb, and Sydney.

programme.title: My Big Family Renovation: Industrial Farmhouse Kitchen
programme.desc: The Hatmakers are fed up with their makeshift outdoor kitchen and are ready to build a new one from the ground up, inside the house.

programme.title: My Big Family Renovation: Playground Bedroom/ Entry Bath
programme.desc: Jen and Brandon convert two awkward spaces in the front of their house into an entry bathroom and bedroom for their youngest daughter.

programme.title: My Big Family Renovation: Heart of the Home
programme.desc: Jen and Brandon move their front door to create a spacious entry foyer, complete with fun storage lockers for all the stuff that comes with five kids.

programme.title: My Big Family Renovation: Retreat for Mom and Dad
programme.desc: Jen and Brandon are transforming a tiny back bedroom and bathroom into a glorious master suite.

programme.title: My Big Family Renovation: Backyard Haven

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Appalachian Underground
programme.desc: A husband surprises his wife with a family vacation home on the edge of a Tennessee rock quarry.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Mountain Timber Frame
programme.desc: A man builds an off-grid timber frame cabin on his family's 100-acre property in upstate New York.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Cabin of No Return
programme.desc: An outdoorsy family of three is determined to build a mammoth off-grid cabin along Idaho's Salmon River after one of their properties was destroyed by a fire. The family takes on rapids to portage out materials and must finish before low tide hits.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Vail Log Cabin
programme.desc: The Walker family rebuilds their 100 year old mining cabin in the Colorado wilderness. Fortunately, they're a family of engineers who are game for any challenges. The tools used for this project will be as old as the cabin itself!

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Island Oasis
programme.desc: Beth wants a beach getaway on the white sandy beaches of Ambergris Caye, Belize. Ken Grissom and his crew transport building materials to the remote island and construct an off-the-grid luxury getaway with the Caribbean water just steps away.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Meat, Pray, Love
programme.desc: Noah Cappe starts at the Delaware State Fair, where he'll eat the very stately Delaware Dog, a hot dog loaded with scrapple. Then, he'll try to tackle the funnel cake-filled Frankenfunnel Burger and the octopus-loaded Octotaco.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Dawn of the Bread
programme.desc: Noah Cappe cruises up the west coast, starting at the Columbia County Fair in St. Helens, Ore. First up is a traditional Indian fry bread stuffed with some non-traditional ingredients, then Noah dives into the coastal fusion of the great Pacific pita.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: When Harry Met Salad
programme.desc: Noah Cappe's first stop is the Wayne County Fair in Richmond, Ind., where he takes a stroll with the Walking BBQ, feels the groove of the King with a bacon PB&J quesadilla, goes healthy-ish with a deep fried salad.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Some Like It Popped
programme.desc: Noah hits the Big Butler Fair in Prospect, PA., where he tears into the Conevore, filled to the brim with smoked brisket, pork and chicken.

programme.desc: When Anne breaks Hop Pop's favorite cane, she and her friends set out to replace it; After Anne's bedroom floods she has to share a room with Sprig.

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania: The Series: Bad Friday/ Hoop Screams
programme.desc: The monsters celebrate bad Friday by trying to win the Screamie for the best scare. Mavis gives Hank the gift of basketball.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Duck Knight Returns!
programme.desc: When Scrooge and Dewey make a gritty Darkwing Duck movie, Launchpad teams up with the original Darkwing to stop it.

programme.title: DuckTales: Timephoon!
programme.desc: When Louie uses Gyro's Time Tub to steal lost treasures from the past, a mysterious storm in the present sends all of space and time crashing down onto the mansion.

programme.title: Polaris: Player Select: The Takeover
programme.desc: A compilation of top gaming videos from YouTube stars.

programme.title: Parker Plays
programme.desc: YouTube star Parker Coppins shares his hilarious gameplay commentary.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Cricket Versus/ Blue Tater
programme.desc: Cricket must wrestle a wild animal in order to prove himself worthy of the Green family name. When Cricket persuades Bill to convert his pickup into a French fry food truck, he discovers a mysterious blue potato that Gramma says is cursed with bad luck.

programme.title: DuckTales: Escape To/ From Atlantis
programme.desc: Dewey's attempts to impress Scrooge on a trip to the Lost City of Atlantis leads to trouble. Donald tries to protect the boys from his new employer who is trying to destroy them.

programme.title: DuckTales: The House of the Lucky Gander
programme.desc: Donald competes with his cousin Gladstone Gander to impress Louie at a mysterious resort in Macaw, while Scrooge tries to lure the kids away from the resort's endless distractions.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Spear of Selene!
programme.desc: Donald is dragged into a feud between Scrooge and Zeus, while Dewey and Webby search for an artifact that may provide the truth about Dewey's mother.

programme.title: Star Wars Resistance: From Beneath
programme.desc: Flix takes Kaz and crew to his homeworld to acquire fuel from his family's refinery, only to discover the family's drilling has awoken something monstrous.

programme.title: Star Wars Resistance: The Relic Raiders
programme.desc: When Kaz and the team arrive on a mysterious planet to buy supplies, they find the outpost has been abandoned and a secret Sith Temple has been raised.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Tourist Trapped
programme.desc: Dipper and Mabel arrive to spend the summer in Gravity Falls and soon discover that something is amiss with the remote town.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Legend of the Gobblewonker
programme.desc: The twins embark on a mission to prove that a legendary sea monster exists at the bottom of the local lake. Soos helps them on a boating mission to prove it exists.

programme.title: Marvel's Spider-Man: How I Thwipped My Summer
programme.desc: Peter Parker struggles to balance the best summer vacation ever and his responsibilities as Spider-Man.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Big Roommates 2
programme.desc: Go Go and Honey Lemon quickly clash when they become roommates. Meanwhile, when a thief steals Honey Lemon’s chem-lab purse, it accidentally turns him into a monster.

programme.title: Parker Plays

programme.title: DuckTales: Friendship Hates Magic!
programme.desc: Stuck as a shadow, Lena tries to protect Webby from her suspicious new friend Violet during a supernatural sleepover.

programme.title: DuckTales: A Nightmare on Killmotor Hill!
programme.desc: The kids are pulled into a world made of their wildest dreams. Unfortunately, Lena's worst nightmare comes true: Magica De Spell is back and coming to reclaim what's hers.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Inconveniencing
programme.desc: When Dipper tries to impress Wendy by acting older than he really is, he's invited to join a group of teenagers on a trek that leads to an old abandoned convenience store that could be haunted.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Dipper vs. Manliness
programme.desc: In a quest to attain manliness, Dipper ventures into the forest to battle the notorious Multi-Bear. Mabel tries to teach Grunkle Stan how to be attractive to women, particularly the waitress in the local diner, Lazy Susan.

programme.title: DuckTales: Treasure of the Found Lamp!
programme.desc: Donald Duck and his nephews are reunited with Scrooge after moving into McDuck Manor.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Shorts: Bottle Shocked/ Black and White/ Space Walkies
Mickey Mouse Shorts: Bee Inspired/ Swimmin' Hole/ Year of the Dog
Big City Greens: Trailer Trouble/ Mansion Madness
programme.desc: Nancy's trailer is stolen by her old biker gang, and the kids resolve to get it back. Cricket house-sits for Remy, but things go awry when the rest of the Greens visit.

programme.title: Amphibia: Croak and Punishment/ Trip to the Archives
programme.desc: When Sprig's Blue Moon Shell is stolen, he and Anne investigate to find the crook. To prepare for Anne's quest, the Plantars go to the archives and accidentally get trapped!

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania: The Series: Mummyfest Destiny/ Bandages of Brothers
programme.desc: Pedro's amulet has the ability to stop time, ensuring he's always first up at the buffet. When Mavis attempts to use it, however, trouble ensues. Since Pedro and Hank aren't getting along, Mavis and Wendy suggest they look for new roommates.

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania: The Series: Fright of Hand/ Dude Where's My Garlic?
programme.desc: Mavis goes a bit too far in wanting to show Aunt Lydia she can throw a proper party.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Muirahara Woods
programme.desc: Hiro, Fred, and Baymax follow the secretive Go Go into the mysterious Muirahara Woods where they get lost and, even worse, everything electronic strangely fails, including Baymax.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Seventh Wheel
programme.desc: Professor Granville becomes increasingly pushy with her suggestions for Big Hero 6 as she helps them try to figure out a mysterious series of food-related burglaries.

programme.desc: A compilation of top gaming videos from YouTube stars.

programme.title: DuckTales: What Ever Happened to Della Duck?!
programme.desc: Marooned, Della struggles for survival against the foreign elements of the Moon.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Golden Spear!
programme.desc: As Della rebuilds her ship, Penumbra becomes convinced Della’s planning an attack. Meanwhile, Donald’s nap keeps getting interrupted by adventure.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Fight Fighters
programme.desc: After being challenged to a video game battle by Wendy's boyfriend Robbie, Dipper is shocked when his favourite playable fighter, Rumble McSkirmish, comes to life to defend him. Dipper soon loses control over Rumble and has to find a way to stop him.

programme.title: Amphibia: Contagi-Anne/ Family Shrub
programme.desc: Anne fakes getting sick to get off work, but the rest of the family gets sick. Sprig and Polly think their family history is boring, until they uncover family secrets.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Depths of Cousin Fethry!
programme.desc: Cousin Fethry takes Huey and Dewey on an expedition to an undersea lab where they encounter the weirdest creature at the bottom of the sea.

programme.title: Marvel's Spider-Man: My Own Worst Ememy
programme.desc: Doc Ock, in Spider-Man's body, intends to bring New York to its knees, but his new brain still contains memories of Uncle Ben.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Prey Date
programme.desc: Hiro and Fred enlist Karmi to find out what Liv Amara is doing to cure Orso Knox, the man who was mysteriously turned into a monster.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Uncaged
programme.desc: Cricket and Tilly’s rebellious mother Nancy Green is fresh out of jail and setting up shop in the city.

programme.title: Movie: The Bourne Ultimatum

programme.title: Movie: The Bourne Identity

programme.title: Movie: Hitch

programme.desc: An elderly white widow is brutally murdered in Greenwood, S.C., and Edward Lee Elmore, an African American handyman, is quickly found guilty and sentenced to death. A tenacious legal intern comes across the case and tries to save him.

programme.title: Forensic Files: True Lies
programme.desc: It took a murder victim's 9 year-old child, notations in a diary, and forensic psychology to determine which forensic evidence was important and which to ignore.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Smoke in Your Eyes
programme.desc: The bodies of two young women are found in the ashes of an apartment fire, which appears to have been set deliberately.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Second Shot at Love
programme.desc: A respected heart surgeon is found dead in the basement of his upscale Cincinnati home and have police assuming he committed suicide.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Journey to Justice
programme.desc: Prosecutor used video testimony to link drunk driver to hit-and-run which killed a child.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Burning Ambition
programme.desc: A Seattle policeman’s home is destroyed by an arsonist. One month later, the officer arrests a low-level drug dealer, who confesses to the arson. But when the suspect vanishes, investigators begin to question the authenticity of his confession.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Memories
programme.desc: A pregnant woman is brutally attacked in her own home and her unborn child is killed. After coming out of her coma, and regaining her memory, she identifies her husband as the perpetrator. A new DNA test lead investigators to a different suspect.

programme.title: Death Row Stories: Love Kills
programme.desc: When 19-year-old Stacey Stites' body is found half-naked by the side of the road, her fiancé, police officer Jimmy Fennell, is cleared as a suspect.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Bad Blood
programme.desc: A young doctor in a rural community is accused of sedating and sexually assaulting two of his female patients. DNA tests demonstrate that the doctor is innocent, but the women continue to insist that he sedated and raped them.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Pure Evil
programme.desc: In 1993, two Texas teenagers, a 14-year-old boy and his 13-year-old stepsister, were brutally murdered. It took forensic evidence and a behavioral profile to identify their killer as Jason Massey, who had a history of torturing animals.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Walking Terror
programme.desc: A neighbour witnesses a man stab and drown his wife. When the man is questioned by police, he remembers nothing, and is shocked at his own actions. The jury must decide if he is a murderer, or suffering from a sleep disorder.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Trial by Fire
programme.desc: A house erupts into flames on a winter night, killing one person and injuring another. The survivor blamed a kerosene heater for the fire, but the evidence did not match her story.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Traces of Truth
programme.desc: A high school gym teacher took time off from class to give his friend a ride home -- and never returned. Investigators suspected foul play, but without a body the case would be difficult to prove.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Honor Thy Father
programme.desc: A 16-year-old girl is killed by her mother and father in her own home. The parents say they acted in self-defence but the forensic evidence indicates otherwise.

programme.title: The Dead Wives Club: The Bookie's Wife
programme.desc: Doris Angleton, a Houston socialite, is found shot to death on her kitchen floor, while her husband Bob was coaching their twin daughters’ softball game.

programme.title: Forensic Files: All Charged Up
programme.desc: Philadelphia authorities use an anonymous letter to locate a perpetrator.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Paintball
programme.desc: In 1962, the people of the small town of Hanford, California lost their sense of peace when one of their own, 15 year-old Marlene Miller, was murdered. It would take 24 years to bring her killer to justice.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Nailed

programme.title: Get Out Alive: Somali Pirate Attack
programme.desc: In 2008, British security guards Carl Mason and Mike Kelly were assigned to protect the oil tanker Biscaglia as it travelled through the Gulf of Aden; it was supposed to be an easy job until the ship was attacked by gun-toting, drug-crazed Somali pirates.

programme.title: Get Out Alive: Quecreek Mine Disaster
programme.desc: July 24 2002, Quecreek Mine, Pennsylvania: 9 miners are trapped in a mine filling with 90 million gallons of water. A huge drill starts to work on a rescue hole, but even that doesn't go according to plan and the miners doubt they'll make it out alive.

programme.title: Get Out Alive: Hijack on Flight 73
programme.desc: Palestinian extremists hijack Flight 73 and head of operations must to save passenger Mike Thexton, next in line to be shot. Here his story.

programme.title: Get Out Alive: Jungle Abduction
programme.desc: A company fishing trip turns into a nightmare when Texas oil worker Jerel Shaffer is abducted at gunpoint.

programme.title: Get Out Alive: Alabama Prison Riot
programme.desc: Byron Sanders is one of eleven prison officers taken hostage by inmates at FCI Talledega in Alabama. After a ten day ordeal, it's up to Commander Dick Rogers and the FBI's newly formed Hostage Rescue Team to get them out alive.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Armageddon Highway
programme.desc: A strange Cuban prison, an eerie escape route built for Armageddon, and an underwater marvel that changed history are mysterious deserted engineering projects, and new discoveries reveal how they were built and why they were abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: City of the Damned
programme.desc: A deserted town in Spain with a bloody past and a ghost fleet heading nowhere are homes to dark secrets.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: America's Doomsday Town
programme.desc: A strange deserted city in America's heartland, an eerie gigantic wall deep in snow-capped mountains, and a mysterious top-secret Soviet facility were built and then abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Nazi Death Star
programme.desc: A Nazi fortress that could have changed history if it was finished, an underwater graveyard of unexpected American treasures, and a network of tunnels hiding a secret history of New York were abandoned for mysterious reasons, and experts investigate why.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Nightmare on Blood Mountain
programme.desc: A ghost ship thousands of miles away from where anyone expected, a bridge to nowhere in Florida's Hurricane Alley, and a haunting mountain complex with a bloody secret are deserted engineering projects, and new discoveries reveal why they were abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: The Town That Disappeared
programme.desc: A haunted lighthouse on Lake Michigan, a town where everyone seems to have vanished all at once, and a secret complex of tunnels beneath London.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Tower of Death
programme.desc: Revealing how an alien Nazi structure that changed history, a strange Soviet monolith known as the Tower of Death, and a concrete ocean giant were built, and why they were abandoned.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Atlanta: To Sleeve, or Not to Sleeve
programme.desc: Amanda wants a dress that shows off her tattoos, but her mom prefers she covers up her ink. Southern gal Lexie needs to find a dress that matches her fiancé's family heirloom veil.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Atlanta: Playing Chicken
programme.desc: Jessica wants a dress to satisfy her conservative fiancé, but her family has other ideas. Savvy shopper Tracy is looking for a deal, but her opinionated friend is unimpressed with the sale rack.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Atlanta: No Time for Nostalgia
programme.desc: Bride Leah is looking for a modern bridal gown with pockets to wear on her wedding day.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Atlanta: Shiny, Happy, Bling!
programme.desc: After spending her youth in outfits covered in bling, Emily wants to wear a traditional gown on her big day. Fashionista Diana is looking for a strapless gown, but her mom has other ideas. At her fitting, Jackie is still looking for her mom's approval.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Atlanta: By the Book
programme.desc: Romance novelist Valerie prefers to live through her storybook characters for gown inspiration. Bride Kristy dreams of walking down the aisle looking just like her favourite childhood doll. In for her fitting, Rachel second guesses her dress selection.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Atlanta: Battle of the Curves
programme.desc: Trina is looking for a dress that will show off her assets, despite her Mom's conservative demands. Bride Shelby wants a gown that shows a little more skin than her traditional Dad would prefer. Bride Haley faces an extra special challenge at her fitting.

programme.title: Welcome to Plathville: Starving for Independence
programme.desc: In order to avoid more tension in the family, Kim allows Moriah to go to San Francisco with Olivia. From the moment they land Moriah quickly realizes she's a long way from south Georgia. Ethan finds creative ways to pass the time while Olivia is gone.

programme.title: Little People, Big World: A New Kind of Thanksgiving
programme.desc: Matt and Amy learn that they won't get to have Thanksgiving with their kids first time in 25 years. If the kids don't rethink their plans and come together for a family celebration, Matt and Amy may face the holiday alone.

programme.title: Counting On: Baby Number Two... But Who?
programme.desc: Joe and Kendra make a visit to Texas to try some creepy, crawly appetizers with Jinger and Jeremy. Then, Jessa seeks help from a speech therapist when Henry struggles with learning new words. Plus, one couple makes a surprise announcement.

programme.title: Welcome to Plathville: Mom's Gonna Find Out
programme.desc: Barry and Kim leave the farm for a night to celebrate their anniversary, putting Micah and Lydia in charge. They just have one rule: Ethan and Olivia aren't allowed to visit the farm while they're away. The Plath kids party and some uninvited guests join.

programme.title: 7 Little Johnstons: A Little Home Improvement
programme.desc: The Johnston family juggles health issues in the midst of a home renovation.

programme.desc: Barry and Kim leave the farm for a night to celebrate their anniversary, putting Micah and Lydia in charge. They just have one rule: Ethan and Olivia aren't allowed to visit the farm while they're away. The Plath kids party and some uninvited guests join.

programme.title: 7 Little Johnstons: A Little Home Improvement
programme.desc: The Johnston family juggles health issues in the midst of a home renovation.

programme.desc: A pianist's finger is accidentally sawed off and missing until his wife and dog come to the ER. A man's pacemaker is killing him, yet keeping him alive, and after his bachelor party, a nurse's fiancé is behaving bizarrely.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Anthony and Marq

programme.title: Chopped: Cornuchopia
programme.desc: The chefs are asked to create a meal with Thanksgiving in mind.

programme.title: Chopped: Teen Tournament: Episode One
programme.desc: A strangely fuzzy ingredient is one of the surprises awaiting the young chefs in the appetizer round. Then in the entree round, a challenging protein must be paired with a processed cheese.

programme.title: Chopped: We Love Leftovers!
programme.desc: All leftovers in the baskets today, and some of the chefs are not happy to hear the news. In the first round the competitors must work with what is left in a casserole dish and at the bottom of a takeout bag.

programme.title: Chopped Junior: Playing Ketchup

programme.title: Chopped Junior: Thanksgiving Leftovers
programme.desc: The kid cooks give new life to Thanksgiving leftovers, beginning in round one with a puree that the preteens haven't eaten in years. Two classics must be repurposed in the entree round, and cranberry sauce desserts are in store.

programme.title: Chopped: Thanksgiving Heroes
programme.desc: Four big-hearted amateur chefs arrive in the Chopped kitchen ready to give the judges an unforgettable Turkey Day meal.

programme.title: Chopped: Thanksgiving Pie, Oh My!
programme.desc: Today’s rounds will be sides, turkey and pie. In round one, the competitors hustle to make magnificent side dishes using a strange ice cream and soup made from Judge Martha Stewart's recipe.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: How The Cookie Crumbles

programme.title: Farmhouse Rules: Wholesome Harvest
programme.desc: After the busy holidays, Nancy Fuller and her husband, David, need to start the year off right, so Nancy's putting together a menu of light and fresh meals. To start off, she's whipping up a get up and go smoothie that packs a punch.

programme.title: Farmhouse Rules: Bonfire Bonding
programme.desc: Nancy is having the family over for some good old-fashioned bonfire bonding! She heads to her local baker to pick up a fresh boule of sourdough for her French onion soup bowls and then finishes up the rest of the meal.

programme.title: Farmhouse Rules: Fall Feast on the Farm
programme.desc: Nancy Fuller heads to her friend's sheep farm to pick up some fresh lamb for a fall feast.

programme.title: Farmhouse Rules: Canvas and Cocktails
programme.desc: Nancy Fuller's good friend is teaching a canvas and cocktails class, so she's promised to teach Nancy to paint in exchange for drinks. Nancy goes all in with a full-on meal that includes lemon and oregano chicken, orzo pilaf salad and mustard greens.

programme.title: Farmhouse Rules: A Nancy Fuller Thanksgiving
programme.desc: Nancy and David are hosting Thanksgiving dinner, and she's sharing some fresh, time-saving spins on her favorite turkey-day dishes. Nancy relives some of the best moments from holidays past and makes new family memories.

programme.title: Farmhouse Rules: Gigi's Thanksgiving
programme.desc: Nancy's family is gathering at the farmhouse for another Fuller Thanksgiving, but this year the kids are in charge of everything from the centerpieces to the place settings. Nancy prepares a Thanksgiving feast featuring a roasted and braised turkey.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Frontier Friendsgiving
programme.desc: Ree's having some serious fun with recipes. There's a stunning turkey roulade rolled around sausage stuffing, then a leek and potato casserole.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: The Building
programme.desc: Ree's pulling together a boxed lunch for a site meeting at an old building.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Grandma's Grocery Games

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Don't Skimp on the Shrimp
programme.desc: Four chefs must make their signature dishes using an insignificant four-and-a-half pounds of ingredients. Next, the chefs must butter up the judges with a fantastic weeknight family dinner featuring jumbo butterfly shrimp.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: They'll Have to Go Through Me
programme.desc: The final part of the crossover event finds our intelligence unit joined by detectives from the SVU to help solve the pedophile case. Ruzek and Amaro, along with Halstead and Antonio continue to hunt for the link to foster care and child trafficking.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Assignment of the Year
programme.desc: While Antonio continues his off-duty security job for Asher and Layla, Asher is killed. Voight works the case while making sure Antonio is covered and Halstead and Lindsay go undercover in a rather uncomfortable location.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Called in Dead
programme.desc: A friend of Nadia's leads the intelligence unit to a huge heroin bust. Unfortunately, this bust results in Olinksy arriving home to find his wife being held hostage.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Shouldn't Have Been Alone
programme.desc: With Burgess in the hospital after suffering gunshot wounds, the intelligence team is determined to find the people responsible. Lindsay delays her start so she can help with the case and the team takes turns watching over Burgess.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: We Don't Work Together Anymore
programme.desc: Lindsay has her first case with the task force and realizes she needs to call on Voight and her Intelligence Unit to assist. Meanwhile, Burgess is back at work and delegated to desk duty, allowing Platt to partner up with Roman.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Disco Bob
programme.desc: Bob Ruzek is the first to arrive at the scene of a double murder. Intelligence arrives to take over the investigation and tensions rise when Bob must hand over the case to his son and Voight. Lindsay heads off to Bolivia for a case.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: A Little Devil Complex
programme.desc: Antonio and his sister Gabriela go to the office of Elliot Gish, the man they believe started the fire that killed Shay. Intelligence puts pressure on Gish to confess. Lindsay approaches Voight about returning to Intelligence.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Erin's Mom
programme.desc: Bunny comes to Lindsay concerned about a suspicious repeat customer at her husband's rental company. This lead brings info into a case which robbery-homicide has been working for months. Voight doesn't trust Bunny's motive for the tip.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: What Do You Do?
programme.desc: Burgess and Roman tackle a dangerous smuggling operation with no means to defend themselves or call for help. Meanwhile, it's a slow day in intelligence and they are spending the day receiving taser certification.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: What Puts You on That Ledge
programme.desc: Commander Fischer updates Voight on a missing officer that Narcotics had deep undercover with a robbery crew. Burgess and Roman deal with a squatter.

programme.title: NCIS: Los Angeles: Cancel Christmas
programme.desc: When a suspected North Korean spy is poisoned and hit by a truck carrying Christmas trees, the team must search for who is responsible for smuggling spies into the country. Also, Deeks and Kensi try to find a way to include their mothers at Christmas.

programme.title: Dateline: Suspicion
programme.desc: After a woman, Teresa, disappears while working at her job on Halloween day, police investigate what could have happened. After many twists and turns, they finally begin to question a suspect that may have a haunting tale of his own.

programme.title: Snapped: Rebecca Bryan
programme.desc: A suspicious shooting reveals a pretty real estate agent’s scandalous secret life.

programme.title: Snapped: Kalila Taylor
programme.desc: The brutal murder of a homecoming queen shocks a NY town.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: The Night Hannah Hill Disappeared
programme.desc: A former homecoming queen taking her first steps into adult life is brutally murdered. Who would want to harm her? The investigation centered on two men and a mysterious black bag that seemed to come out of nowhere.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: While They Were Sleeping
programme.desc: It was a brutal and baffling crime: a husband shot dead in his own bed. No one else in the house was hurt, not even his wife, who was sleeping beside him. Investigators were suspicious, but there were more surprises in store.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Graduation Night
programme.desc: It started with a party, high school seniors celebrating graduation. Before the night was through, one man was dead and two teens were facing a long fight for justice.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Secrets and Lies
programme.desc: The fire broke out before dawn. After the smoke cleared, a mother of two young children was found dead. It was the tragic end to a life that held so much promise, but for investigators, it was just the beginning.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Toxic
programme.desc: Kevin and Morgan Mengel were happy at first, but when the marriage went bad, he went missing. Police wondered if he simply left, but a family's relentless pursuit lead to a stunning confrontation and, eventually, the truth.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Deadly Deceit
programme.desc: A family mourned the loss of a young mother in a house fire. Authorities ruled it an accident. Then, years later, there was another accident and second loved one was gone.

programme.title: Snapped: Monique Berkley

programme.title: Snapped: Wendi Andriano
programme.desc: The premature death of a cancer victim leaves his wife facing lethal injection.

programme.title: Snapped: Malaika Griffin

programme.title: Snapped: Erika Sifrit
