programme.desc: California is the site of an alarming spate of shark attacks. The question is, why?

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Curse of the Haunted Prison
programme.desc: A mysterious American pyramid built out of Cold War paranoia, a haunted prison, and a strange cluster of structures in the Atlantic are mysterious deserted engineering projects are investigated.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Desert Ghost Fort
programme.desc: A secret Russian military base in the Gobi Desert, a strange complex in an American wasteland, and a relic high atop a mountain are mysterious deserted engineering projects, and new discoveries reveal how they were built and why they were abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Escobar's Castle
programme.desc: The ruins of a once-palatial compound contain the secrets of one of history's most notorious criminals. Plus, new discoveries reveal why this high-security estate was built and why it was abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: American Atlantis
programme.desc: An abandoned town in the Nevada desert are the ruins of an American Atlantis, destroyed by catastrophic floods when the Hoover Dam was built. Today, experts investigate the secrets of this eerie ghost town as water levels recede and the city re-emerges.

programme.title: Unearthed: Mysteries, Monsters, and Gods
programme.desc: New discoveries at long-lost ruins reveal the truth behind some of the greatest mysteries of the Greek world, and using cutting-edge tech and innovative archaeological methods, experts turning up groundbreaking evidence that could prove ancient myth.

programme.title: Forbidden History: Finding Hitler's Gold
programme.desc: New evidence might finally pinpoint the location of missing gold and artwork that the Nazis stole during World War II, and using cutting-edge tech, experts are making history-changing discoveries that could lead to a billion-dollar payday.

programme.title: Unexplained and Unexplored: Curse of Superstition Mountains
programme.desc: New discoveries at the site of an alleged long-lost gold mine could lead investigators to a 200-million-dollar payday, and using cutting-edge tech, experts investigate clues in long-lost maps and relics to recover the Lost Dutchman's treasure.

programme.title: Unearthed: Lost City of Troy
programme.desc: The legendary lost city at the center of the Trojan War is Troy, but its existence has never been confirmed. Now, discoveries and cutting-edge science might prove if this place existed, and if the Greeks really conquered it with the infamous Trojan Horse.

programme.title: Forbidden History: Finding Hitler's Gold
programme.desc: New evidence might finally pinpoint the location of missing gold and artwork that the Nazis stole during World War II, and using cutting-edge tech, experts are making history-changing discoveries that could lead to a billion-dollar payday.

programme.title: Unexplained and Unexplored: Curse of Superstition Mountains
programme.desc: New discoveries at the site of an alleged long-lost gold mine could lead investigators to a 200-million-dollar payday, and using cutting-edge tech, experts investigate clues in long-lost maps and relics to recover the Lost Dutchman's treasure.

programme.title: Unearthed: Hunt for the Real Atlantis
programme.desc: A mysterious ruined city in Greece is the home of the mythical Labyrinth and the Minotaur, and its catastrophic downfall might have inspired the legend of Atlantis. New discoveries at this site reveal a truth stranger than fiction.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Conspiracy on Devil's Mountain
programme.desc: A secret structure on a sinister mountain, an industrial compound swallowed by a forest, and a mysterious run in a sand dune are strange deserted engineering projects, and new discoveries reveal how they were built and why they were abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Curse of Hell Island
programme.desc: Explore a ghost town that was once a dangerous industrial hellscape, a giant warship at the bottom of the ocean, and a top secret relic that could have changed the Cold War.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Nazi Ghost Town
programme.desc: Revisit a Soviet megastructure, a massive Nazi brainwashing complex, and a dangerous desert pass to find out how they were built and why they were mysteriously abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Tower of Death
programme.desc: Revealing how an alien Nazi structure that changed history, a strange Soviet monolith known as the Tower of Death, and a concrete ocean giant were built, and why they were abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: City of the Damned
programme.desc: A deserted town in Spain with a bloody past and a ghost fleet heading nowhere are homes to dark secrets.

programme.title: How It's Made: Barber Chairs; Sewage Pumps; Bimini Boat Tops; Diesel Filters
programme.desc: Mark Tewksbury shows viewers how some familiar objects of everyday life are made.

programme.title: How It's Made: Hockey Sticks, Bronzed Baby Shoes, Treadmills, Handheld Computers
programme.desc: Follow the production of pro hockey sticks, bronzed baby shoes, treadmills and handheld computers.

programme.title: How It's Made: Sharpening Steels, Bladder Pumps, Ironing Boards, and Kayak Paddles
programme.desc: This episode features sharpening steels, bladder pumps, ironing boards, and kayak paddles.

programme.title: How It's Made: Carbon Fibre, Antique Frame Restoration, Railcar Movers, Hood Ornaments
programme.desc: Carbon fibre; antique frame restoration; railcar movers; hood ornaments.

programme.title: How It's Made: Mountain Bikes, Rice, Lever Action Rifles
programme.desc: This episode includes: mountain bikes, rice and lever action rifles.

programme.title: How It's Made: Graphene/ The World's Smallest Car/ Force Tester/ Composite Cans
programme.desc: Featured: graphene; world's smallest car; force testers; composite cans.

programme.title: Underground Marvels: The Renegade's Lair
programme.desc: A strange underground system known as the Black Cave is connected to a fairytale castle and was home to an infamous nobleman on the run from the law; today, experts investigate the secrets he left here to discover new parts of this mysterious network.

programme.title: Underground Marvels: Mystery of the Lost Labyrinth
programme.desc: A strange, centuries-old labyrinth built into an abandoned quarry was built by an eccentric millionaire, and no one knows why; but now, a new excavation into this mysterious 9,000-foot tunnel system might finally reveal its dark secrets.

programme.title: Underground Marvels: Secrets of the Terror Tunnels
programme.desc: A vast system of tunnels built almost three thousand years ago was the site of the greatest battles of antiquity, and these disorienting passages could be the deadliest weapon in war. Experts reveal what made this underground world so terrifying.

programme.title: Underground Marvels: Secrets of the Rock
programme.desc: A hidden, subterranean city built within the Rock of Gibraltar was an immense fortress to control the seas during World War II, and new discoveries reveal the secrets of a long-lost chamber with evidence of high-stakes espionage.

programme.title: Female Forces: Breaking in the Rookie
programme.desc: Rookie officer Sara Rolfe completes her police training and gets a surprise visit from Betsy and Julie when they drop by the academy to check on her progress. Sara then gets a taste of real police work when she goes on patrol.

programme.title: Female Forces: Crash Makeover
programme.desc: Betsy and Officer Julie Lardino convince Officer Tracy to undergo a head-to-toe makeover while still keeping the city safe.

programme.title: Female Forces: For Better or for Worse
programme.desc: Officer Dawn Yorke tries to settle domestic dispute with a wife who refuses to let her abusive husband back into their home. Next, Sgt. Betsy Brantner-Smith gives a good lecture to a husband who gets pulled over after bickering with his wife.

programme.title: Female Forces: Red Alert
programme.desc: Betsy, Julie and Tracy release some aggression and train for hand-to-hand combat with their nightstick batons. Officer Dawn Yorke deals with a belligerent homeless man accused of casing a parking lot for possible theft.

programme.title: American Justice: Who Killed the Candy Heiress?: The Helen Brach Story
programme.desc: The strange case of candy heiress Helen Brach, who disappeared without a trace in 1977.

programme.title: Nightwatch: When Work Becomes Family
programme.desc: It's New Year's in New Orleans and gun violence is rampant as police and EMS deal with armed robberies and shootings. Plus, EMT Gavin returns to the job, and everyone celebrates a new addition to the family.

programme.title: Nightwatch: 105 and Rising
programme.desc: It's a hot and humid night in New Orleans, and as temperatures rise, violence erupts. Police chase two carjacking suspects. Keeley treats an injured young family. Titus and Dan respond to a call from a former Playboy bunny.

programme.title: My Evil Sister: Dead Ringer/ My Sister's Keeper
programme.desc: Neighbours always mix up sisters Sarah and Stevie, but their polar-opposite personalities is what set them apart in the end. Elena and Christina were both adopted, but these teenage sisters love, laugh, and battle like blood relatives.

programme.title: My Evil Sister: Lose a Sister, Gain a Husband/ The Sinner and the Saint
programme.desc: When a friendly neighbor marries barely legal Linda, he rescues her from abject poverty, and invites her sister, Patti, into their twisted relationship.

programme.title: My Evil Sister: Murder by Minivan/ Lose a Sister Gain a Baby
programme.desc: When Teresa's brother marries Betty Jo, the young bride becomes the sister Teresa was always dying for.

programme.title: Grace vs. Abrams
programme.desc: Nancy Grace and Dan Abrams debate infamous crimes and legal cases.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Killer-In-Laws
programme.desc: These Deadly Women satisfied their blood lust within the family.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Death Watch
programme.desc: These Deadly Women get their kicks from the suffering of others.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Girl on Girl
programme.desc: They may be the fairer sex but when they clash it can be downright brutal. An abusive mother takes drastic steps to keep custody of her child; a small town gossip sparks a murderous grudge match; and a teen bully makes a shocking move.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Married Today, Gone Tomorrow
programme.desc: Sometimes the most dangerous place to be is in the arms of your loved one.

programme.title: Evil Twins: Mother of Evil
programme.desc: For identical twins Mark and Martin Stephens, life in a family of twins has been anything but normal. But one of them is more unusual than the others. And before long, someone close will learn just how deadly a lifetime of unrealized dreams can be.

programme.title: Relatively Evil: Blood Money
programme.desc: After two-long lost brothers connect as young adults, a dark disturbance emerges within the newly blended family unit.

programme.title: Truth About Murder With Sunny Hostin: Break, Enter, Kill
programme.desc: When Lisa Fein disappears from her rural Michigan home, her young son tells police he saw her being attacked by a man in a snowmobile helmet. After a three-day search, Lisa's body is found in a shallow grave. Police set their sights on three people.

programme.title: Web of Lies: Fatal Facade
programme.desc: When two teenage girls fall in love, their hedonistic lifestyle is played out on social media for all to see. Behind the façade, petty jealousies and insecurities escalate until finally the pressure erupts in a frenzy of shocking violence.

programme.title: Relatively Evil: Blood Money
programme.desc: After two-long lost brothers connect as young adults, a dark disturbance emerges within the newly blended family unit.

programme.title: Truth About Murder With Sunny Hostin: Break, Enter, Kill
programme.desc: When Lisa Fein disappears from her rural Michigan home, her young son tells police he saw her being attacked by a man in a snowmobile helmet. After a three-day search, Lisa's body is found in a shallow grave. Police set their sights on three people.

programme.title: Web of Lies: Fatal Facade
programme.desc: When two teenage girls fall in love, their hedonistic lifestyle is played out on social media for all to see. Behind the façade, petty jealousies and insecurities escalate until finally the pressure erupts in a frenzy of shocking violence.

programme.title: Evil Twins: Mother of Evil
programme.desc: For identical twins Mark and Martin Stephens, life in a family of twins has been anything but normal. But one of them is more unusual than the others. And before long, someone close will learn just how deadly a lifetime of unrealized dreams can be.

programme.title: Dangerous Persuasions: Forsaken by God
programme.desc: Maura Schmierer joins a Christian group to devote her life to God. Instead she's trapped in a militaristic regime that destroys her marriage and separates her from her children. She ends up in solitary confinement with a new name - 'Forsaken'.

programme.title: Dangerous Persuasions: Highway to Hate
programme.desc: Kerry Noble took his pregnant wife to a Christian commune, where he was led into a world of racism and mass-murder.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: Night of the Machete
programme.desc: Two young couples in an Idaho apartment building walk on eggshells around a neighbor who can't stand the one couple's music and the other's dog. Tensions keep rising between all parties until finally hell breaks loose and a violent rampage erupts.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: Neighborhood Madhouse
programme.desc: A young family moves to the paradise of Longboat Key Florida, for a better life. But when their psychologist neighbor discovers that the man of the house might be a violent criminal, she vows to protect herself - with devastating consequences.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: Bonfire of Blood
programme.desc: An argument about access to a disputed road puts two Lompico, California men at each other's throats. Things progress from intimidation and property damage to a backhoe attack and, finally, one of the most shocking murders the area has ever seen.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID: Mystery in Apartment 410
programme.desc: It is a Southern California mystery ripped straight from a Hollywood script, yet the actors in this drama are real, and so are the twists and turns that unfold in solving a double murder.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID: By the River's Edge
programme.desc: A young woman is found dead along the banks of a North Carolina river. A man is convicted for her murder. But is he truly guilty, or the victim of over-zealous investigators? A crusading attorney, certain he's innocent, fights to free him from prison.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID: What Lies Beneath
programme.desc: Michael Vilkin was pursuing his dream, clearing land to build a home. But a simmering feud with a neighbor would explode in pent-up rage, and lead to murder. And a famous doctor's family-friendly reputation is shattered when inner demons are revealed.

programme.title: The Wonderland Murders: Blood in the Water
programme.desc: It's a Christmas day murder scene Portland detectives will never forget, a young woman bound, gagged and mutilated in a horrific manner. And when the killer then turns his sick sights on Homicide Detective Molly Daul, the stakes rise even higher.

programme.title: The Wonderland Murders: Terror in the Pines
programme.desc: He was the most wanted man in America, a triple murderer on the run with nothing to lose and chilling confession letter threatening cops. When he meets a single mom who falls for his charms, time will tell if he can keep the secret.

programme.title: The Wonderland Murders: She Never Saw It Coming
programme.desc: A young Iranian mom and wife lands the perfect job with a Portland insurance agency. But her charm and intellect make her the focus for several male co-workers. Corporate intrigue turns to cold-blooded murder when she's found dead, shot in the head.

programme.title: The Wonderland Murders: Unhinged
programme.desc: Three college students believe it's their calling to rid Portland of 'its sinners,' committing 'overkill' murders to make their point.

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Mao: China's Chairman of Death
programme.desc: Mao Zedong, Supreme Leader of Communist China for 30 years, is one of the 20th Century's most ruthless tyrants. His reign of cruelty and revenge, transforms him to a position of authority so great, his personality cult remains to this day.

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Stalin: Russia's Steel Tyrant
programme.desc: For 30 years, Joseph Stalin rules the Soviet Union with an iron fist. Anyone who stands in his way will be destroyed.

programme.title: Inside Secret Societies: The Priory of Sion
programme.desc: Inside Secret Societies investigates the mysterious secret society known as 'The Priory of Sion' that traces its roots back to the 12th Century and is believed to protect incontrovertible, if heretical, information about the marriage of Jesus Christ.

programme.title: Inside Secret Societies: The Order of Assassins
programme.desc: The Assassins were one of the mostly deadly, notorious and secretive groups in the medieval world. Find out if the romance behind these brutally efficient killers is true and if their skills and tactics have been copied by today's Islamic terrorists.

programme.title: Inside Secret Societies: The KKK
programme.desc: We delve into the world of the most notorious white supremacist group in America, the KKK. Once having over a million members, today it's just a shadow of its former self. We meet real members and look at the impact of the group has had on America.

programme.title: Inside Secret Societies: The Brotherhood of the Blood
programme.desc: Sworn to protect and preserve the Holy Blood of Christ, the Brotherhood of the Blood are a dark and mysterious sect. We go on a quest to shed light on a group shrouded in secrecy through the ages, revealing the extreme methods the Brotherhood used.

programme.title: Inside Secret Societies: The Yakuza
programme.desc: We go on the hunt to unearth the secrets of a widespread criminal gang in the heart of Japan who are engaged in a variety of criminal activity including extortion, prostitution and illegal gambling. It is a hard-hitting, slick-dressing network of gangs.

programme.title: Inside Secret Societies: Nazi Occult Societies
programme.desc: We uncover what lies behind the history of the overwhelming military power of the Nazis: their strong belief in ancient mysticism, the occult, and even alien contact which fuelled their desire to rule as a genetically pure super-race.

programme.title: Inside Secret Societies: The Brotherhood of the Blood
programme.desc: Sworn to protect and preserve the Holy Blood of Christ, the Brotherhood of the Blood are a dark and mysterious sect. We go on a quest to shed light on a group shrouded in secrecy through the ages, revealing the extreme methods the Brotherhood used.

programme.title: Inside Secret Societies: The Order of Assassins
programme.desc: The Assassins were one of the mostly deadly, notorious and secretive groups in the medieval world. Find out if the romance behind these brutally efficient killers is true and if their skills and tactics have been copied by today's Islamic terrorists.

programme.title: Inside Secret Societies: The Priory of Sion
programme.desc: Inside Secret Societies investigates the mysterious secret society known as 'The Priory of Sion' that traces its roots back to the 12th Century and is believed to protect incontrovertible, if heretical, information about the marriage of Jesus Christ.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: U-Boat Terror
programme.desc: The global reach of the war reveals itself, as the incredible stories of those at sea are heard. Relentless attacks by U-Boats push the British to develop new strategies to defeat this evil empire.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Pearl Harbor
programme.desc: Experience the event that changed the war's course, hear the stories of those who were there and feel the momentum behind the attack that provoked the world's greatest superpower to join the Allied forces.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Bombing the Reich
programme.desc: Devastation touches the civilians of Germany. With the U.S. as a newly engaged Ally, western forces bring the war to the Axis front, but at extreme costs.

programme.title: WWII in the Pacific: Waking the Beast
programme.desc: On December 7, 1941 Japan gambles all and attacks the US. In the first months of the war it looks as though Japan is unbeatable until the US fights back. The War in the Pacific engulfs Asia and launches an entirely new form of naval warfare.

programme.title: Project Nazi: The Blueprints of Evil: The Industry of War
programme.desc: Hitler is determined to rebuild Germany's military strength after the destruction of almost all its weaponry in the First World War. To overcome his country's dire shortage of raw materials, he plans to steal them from other countries.

programme.title: Project Nazi: The Blueprints of Evil: Hitler's Highways
programme.desc: Hitler promises to make Germany great again by creating 14,000 miles of freeway and building one and half million 'People's Cars' every year. Instead, the Nazi war economy relies on millions of forced labourers and prisoners.

programme.title: Project Nazi: The Blueprints of Evil: Designed for Power
programme.desc: Hitler's mastery of propaganda, and instinct for effective design, used to create everything from the swastika flag to the striking uniforms of the storm troopers, help win huge support for the Nazi party, a vital step in its march towards total power.

programme.title: Bullet Points: America's First War on Communism
programme.desc: Five years after the end of World War Two, the Cold War turns hot when America faces two communist giants in Korea and succeeds in keeping tyranny in check.

programme.title: Bullet Points: Battle for the Pacific
programme.desc: See how America recovered from Pearl Harbor and, in one year, achieved supremacy in the Pacific over the Japanese empire. Featuring highlights of the defining battles that turned the tide in the Pacific theater and led to victory.

programme.title: Bullet Points: Showdown in the Middle East
programme.desc: From 1948 to 1973 the Arabs and Israelis went to war five times for territory in the holy land of Palestine. See the key operations in one of the longest ongoing conflicts in world history.

programme.title: Renovation Realities: The Wright Job
programme.desc: Two women with minimal DIY skills dream of opening a bed and breakfast. They first must create a master suite in their historic mansion. Before long they encounter one problem after another.

programme.title: Renovation Realities: The Blackwell Job
programme.desc: Hannah and Brad Blackwell moved into their dream home and could not be happier, but they did find a way that they could be cleaner if they renovate the master bath.

programme.title: Renovation Realities: The Davies Job
programme.desc: Teresa Davies and her husband Paul are sick of their sons' nasty bathroom. They have 3 boys who terrorize the bathroom, and they are ready to gut the whole space. What they discover is three boys can destroy anything.

programme.title: Renovation Realities: The Eubank Job
programme.desc: John Eubank has been slowly renovating his home in downtown Baltimore for around 2 years. The final step for him is the kitchen where he plans to demo a wall to create an open floor plan.

programme.title: American Rehab: Buffalo: Modern Vintage Kitchen and Dining Room
programme.desc: Jason and Bernice buy a 1910 house at auction and begin work on their biggest restoration yet. Starting with the kitchen and dining room, they tear down walls and install more windows, and add back in reclaimed wainscoting and bench seating.

programme.title: American Rehab: Buffalo: Living Room Revamp
programme.desc: As they renovate the living room, Jason and Bernice run into massive issues as they open up the damaged ceiling, and they face design challenges as they add a hidden powder room in the entryway to the house.

programme.title: American Rehab: Buffalo: Master Suite Swap
programme.desc: Jason and Bernice have big plans to move the master bedroom from the front of the house to its original home in back. After discovering rot in an exterior wall, they have to completely rebuild and add a new header.

programme.title: American Rehab: Buffalo: Double Bedroom Upgrade
programme.desc: Jason and Bernice turn the large bedroom in the front of the house into two unique bedrooms. They also work to restore the home's original bathroom, but find standing water in the bathroom floor, and face cracking walls as they add insulation.

programme.title: American Rehab: Buffalo: Eclectic Attic
programme.desc: Jason and Bernice transform the unfinished attic into an eclectic living space, and make a bold, colorful update to the exterior. They draw inspiration from the artistic community in Buffalo to create unique installations.

programme.title: American Rehab: Buffalo: Buffalo Backyard
programme.desc: Jason and Bernice finish off the renovation by revamping the tired backyard, adding a pergola-covered dining area, a back deck and creating a unique fence out of salvaged doors.

programme.title: Holmes Makes It Right: Retooled: Flood Suckers
programme.desc: After a historic downpour in the City of Toronto, Gina’s basement floods with water from the city’s sewage system. Mike does double-duty as he tries to save this family’s home as well as the memories stored in an old workshop in the basement.

programme.title: Holmes Makes It Right: House Sandwich
programme.desc: Mike gets called to a house that’s flooding after two monster custom homes are built on either side. The homeowners want to blame the builders, but Mike reveals that the real solution lies closer to home.

programme.title: Holmes Makes It Right: Retooled: Investment Gate
programme.desc: Mike Holmes helps a couple pick up the pieces after getting conned out of $300,000 by a contractor friend who has conned millions from other families.

programme.title: Holmes Makes It Right: Lawn and Order
programme.desc: Dan and Sarah envied their neighbour's deck, and after receiving a too good to be true quote, hired the same person for the job. But the project was much bigger than anticipated and vastly underquoted. Mike arrives just in time to avoid catastrophe.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Out Of This World Bbq
programme.desc: Roger meets a pit master with a PhD who cooks Carolina-style whole hog barbecue in Louisiana. Dr. Howard Conyers is an engineer for NASA by day, but a pit master at night.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Crazy for Chicken
programme.desc: Roger travels across Massachusetts to meet two chefs who are putting a brand new spin on fire-roasted, rotisserie chicken.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Where There's Smoke
programme.desc: Roger Mooking follows the smoke signals to two Texas restaurants. At Bin Tapas Bar in San Antonio, Texas, Roger and Chef Jason Dady cook a giant pan of paella flavored with Thai ingredients and cooked over a wood burning fire.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Texas BBQ
programme.desc: Roger visits two legendary BBQ joints in Texas where just the right amount of smoke and heat transforms the meat into delicious eats.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Lighting Up Louisiana
programme.desc: Roger Mooking is in Louisiana, where smoked meat makes an appearance in many classic Cajun dishes. He meets Chef Nathanial Zimet, who serves North Carolina-style smoked whole hog in po' boy sandwiches at Bourree in New Orleans.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Getting Piggy With It
programme.desc: Roger Mooking goes hog-wild at two legendary barbecue restaurants located in America's Barbecue Belt. At A&R Bar-B-Que in Memphis, Roger helps owner Andrew Pillard load racks of St. Louis-style ribs into custom wood-fired pits.

programme.title: Food Network Kitchen Cooks
programme.desc: Food Network Kitchen Cooks showcases the incredible variety of talent and recipes available to cook along with and discover on the Food Network Kitchen App.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Phenomenal Philly Food Feast
programme.desc: Nick Lachey hooks up with Michael Symon in Philadelphia, one of the best beer cities in the country with a food scene to match. From Chef Jose Garces' over-the-top bourbon burger, to true German smoked sausages.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Stuffed, Spicy and Cheesy
programme.desc: In Queens, N.Y., Michael Symon gets in touch with his Greek heritage with a classic lamb and feta cheeseburger, and then he sinks his teeth into an Italian-style burger stuffed with smoky mozzarella and prosciutto.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Symon's Cleveland 'que
programme.desc: Michael Symon starts in his hometown of Cleveland, Ohio, at his very own restaurant where he enjoys a tender, juicy and hulking pastrami beef rib and a gets a special look at his grandfather's recipe for scratch-made spaetzle and spicy sauerkraut.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Slammin' Hot and Smoky
programme.desc: In Asheville, N.C., Michael Symon digs into a slammin' sandwich with three different cuts of pork smothered in triple-cheese sauce.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Austin, Texas
programme.desc: Casey Webb's appetizing trek across America brings him to Austin, TX. He starts with a 2-pound barbecue behemoth packed with every meat, sauce and side on the menu.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Worcester, MA
programme.desc: Casey Webb lands in Worcester, MA, where he slurps down some radical ramen, indulges in peanut butter cup French toast and takes on a rack of deep-fried ribs with the heat of a million Scoville units.

programme.title: Dinner at Tiffani's: Ladies Who Lunch
programme.desc: Tiffani Thiessen invites Julie Benz and Sasha Alexander for a ladies lunch that's nothing short of decadent and delicious. Tiffani puts her spin on a classic Chopped Salad, along with Homemade Breadsticks, and Jumbo Crab Cakes with tartar sauce.

programme.title: Dinner at Tiffani's: Big Game
programme.desc: Bill Bellamy and Nicole Sullivan are on the right team when Tiffani Thiessen invites them over for a game day feast. Tiffani will be tackling terrifically tender pulled pork sandwiches with a bright and crunchy brussels sprouts slaw.

programme.title: Dinner at Tiffani's: Tiffani's Mardi Gras Celebration
programme.desc: It's Mardi Gras at Tiffani Thiessen's and she's dishing up her take on the best of the bayou for her friends. Hot crab and kale dip with Creole crostini is the perfect start to this carnival.

programme.title: Dinner at Tiffani's: Breakfast For Dinner
programme.desc: Tiffani hosts a PJ party for her friends Bree Turner and Marla Sokoloff, serving up her favorite morning dishes at night. Recipes include, savory potato pancakes and sausage and goat cheese egg casserole.

programme.title: Cake Hunters: Bling It On
programme.desc: Crystal looks to have a grand cake that lives up to her artistic and crazy personality, while Kevin is dying to have a cake blinged to death to bring Hollywood to Baltimore.

programme.title: Cake Hunters: Bil Ol' Cake
programme.desc: Janna, Sally and Jennifer are longtime employees of Southfork Ranch, known worldwide as the Ewing ranch from the TV series 'Dallas.' Southfork is planning their biggest event of the year with 500 people attending.

programme.title: Cake Hunters: A Cake With Crunch
programme.desc: Jennifer and Gustav met on a medical volunteer trip in Honduras, and now seven years later they're about to tie the knot in front of 200 family and friends. Gustav wants a traditional wedding cake with classic touches, like clean lines and white flowers.

programme.title: Cake Hunters: Not So Sweet Sixteen
programme.desc: Skylar is about to celebrate her 16th birthday, and is at odds with her mom, Donna, over the perfect design for the cake.

programme.title: Amphibia: Anne Theft Auto / Breakout Star
programme.desc: A fearless teen is magically transported to a rural marshland full of frog people.

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania: The Series: Four Monsters and a Funeral/ Rainbow Doom
programme.desc: Mavis has to hold a mock funeral after fibbing to Death and saying her Uncle Gene is dead. Mavis beats the video game, Rainbow Doom, using a cursed code, but the curse brings the game to life.

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania: The Series: Top Wing/ Fried Mean Tomatoes
programme.desc: Mavis and Quasimodo host some cooking classes at the hotel, but things don't go quiet as planned. Wendy wants to join the aerial security team, the Night Warts, but tensions arise when Mavis makes the team instead.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Something Fluffy
programme.desc: When mysterious but adorable creatures called Mayoi suddenly appear in San Fransokyo, Hiro is convinced that they’re part of some nefarious plot by Liv Amara.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Lie Detector
programme.desc: Hiro, Baymax and the rest of the Big Hero 6 team continue their journey to San Fransokyo.

programme.title: Polaris: Player Select: Push, Pull, Pogo
programme.desc: Jack tries to deliver mail on a pogo stick, Markiplier takes on a boss battle in Cuphead, Dan swallows up scenery in Donut County, and Muselk attempts a new Fortnite challenge.

programme.title: Parker Plays: Parker's Gotta Go
programme.desc: YouTube star Parker Coppins shares his hilarious gameplay commentary.

programme.title: DuckTales: Nothing Can Stop Della Duck!
programme.desc: Della Duck has faced every danger the moon has to offer to reunite with her family, but her greatest challenge is one she might not be able to fight her way out of.

programme.title: DuckTales: What Ever Happened to Donald Duck?!
programme.desc: Donald and Penumbra must break out of a Moon Prison and send a warning to Earth about a looming invasion. Meanwhile, Dewey and Webby uncover a sinister conspiracy targeting their family.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Deep End
programme.desc: When Mabel befriends a cute Merman trapped in the deep end of the public pool, she's determined to return him to his family in the ocean, even though that means her whirlwind romance will come to an end.

programme.title: Amphibia: Lily Pad Thai/ Plantar's Last Stand
programme.desc: Anne gets a job at Stumpy’s and goes overboard turning the diner into a Thai restaurant. After a rent increase on the food stand, Anne convinces Hop Pop to sell Plantar's Potions.

programme.title: DuckTales: The 87 Cent Solution!
programme.desc: The kids must stop Scrooge’s unhealthy obsession with a few missing coins to keep him from becoming the next Glomgold.

programme.title: Marvel's Spider-Man: Critical Update
programme.desc: Doc Ock, in Spider-Man/Peter Parker's body, adjusts to his new life as a hero. He finds ways to streamline his methods into a more efficient (albeit much less friendly) approach.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Write Turn Here
programme.desc: Hiro is forced to write a story for his class and decides to write a Big Hero 6 story. Meanwhile, strange versions of Noodle Burger Boy attack the team.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Trailer Trouble/ Mansion Madness
programme.desc: Nancy's trailer is stolen by her old biker gang, and the kids resolve to get it back. Cricket house-sits for Remy, but things go awry when the rest of the Greens visit.

programme.title: Beyblade Burst Turbo: Epic Voyage Battleship Cruise
programme.desc: Aiger, Hae-jin, and Cap’n hop aboard the Battleship Cruise. Aiger will have to face off against friend and foe if he wants a shot at battling World Champion.

programme.title: Pokémon: Sun & Moon - Ultra Adventures: Bright Lights, Big Changes!

programme.desc: The Banks family appears on 'The Oprah Winfrey Show' and their bickering causes an uproar.

programme.title: Movie: All About the Benjamins
programme.desc: A bounty hunter and the con man he's pursuing stumble upon a multi-million dollar stash of diamonds. They are forced to team up in order to catch the criminal responsible.

programme.title: Movie: A Christmas Detour
programme.desc: Two NYC-bound travellers find themselves linked when a storm waylays their flight to an airport hotel in Buffalo. Desperate to get home in time for Christmas, a woman seeks help, in any form, to make a Christmas miracle happen.

programme.title: Movie: Write Before Christmas
programme.desc: A woman writes special Christmas cards to those who inspired her.

programme.desc: After getting fired from her job at a ritzy NYC hotel, a woman accepts a job as a governess to a young girl. She finds herself attracted to the girl’s father, who is king of the country, and love reigns over the kingdom.

programme.desc: A flight attendant is asked to stay for Christmas by a family after she returns a package left on a plane by a passenger and misses her connection back home.

programme.title: Movie: Christmas at Pemberley Manor
programme.desc: A rookie party planner works with a serious and all-business to put together a Christmas festival with help from a merrily enigmatic caretaker who looks like Santa. As the festival approaches, the spirit of the holidays may lead to a wish of love.

programme.desc: An aspiring romance writer attends a writer's conference at a beautiful Vermont Inn where she meets another writer suffering from writer's block.

programme.desc: A real estate developer is given the opportunity to transform an old shopping complex into a prime location. Unfortunately, there is one tenant who is holding out, the Christmas shop owner he met just days earlier.

programme.title: South Park: Wing
programme.desc: The boys set up the 'Awesome Talent Agency' and pool all their resources to impress their first client only to have an agency run by the Chinese Mafia steal her away.

programme.title: South Park: The Losing Edge
programme.desc: The kids desperately want to bring an end to the boring baseball season. The problem is, they keep winning.

programme.title: South Park: Eat, Pray, Queef

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sign Here
programme.desc: A young woman walked out of a department store, got into a rental car, and was never seen again. The signature on the rental car agreement turned out to be a forgery.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Shot of Vengeance
programme.desc: A 34-year-old nurse, who had been experiencing a variety of flu-like symptoms with no discernible explanation, is diagnosed as HIV-positive, and further investigation reveals that the method in which she contracted the disease was no accident.

programme.desc: A man confesses to killing his wife, but forensic evidence may lead to another suspect.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Til Death Do Us Part
programme.desc: A Chemist suddenly starts to suffer from foot pain, partial numbness, and hair loss. He was initially mis-diagnosed. Investigators started searching the lab he worked in and interrogated some co-workers.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Core Evidence
programme.desc: When a 16-month-old baby dies, tests discover e. coli in her system. Eventually the bacteria are traced back to a fruit juice manufacturer.

programme.title: Real Life Nightmare: Horror at the Campground
programme.desc: A family camping trip to the remote Idaho mountains turns into something out of a horror movie when two-year-old DeOrr Kunz disappears. At first it looks like he may have been abducted, until other disturbing theories start to emerge.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Bag of Evidence
programme.desc: When a 9-year old girl disappears, an anonymous caller leads police to her body.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Dressed to Kill
programme.desc: When a six-year-old girl disappears without a trace, the parents become prime suspects.

programme.title: Forensic Files: One for the Road
programme.desc: After a married couple decided to escape the cold of winter with a vacation in Key West, the wife went missing and police searched the island without finding any evidence. Then two important pieces of video surfaced.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Plastic Puzzle
programme.desc: When a bicycle rider is struck and fatally injured in a hit-and-run accident, forensic investigators utilize an assortment of miniscule clues to determine the identity of the offending vehicle and eventually the person who was driving it.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Road Rage
programme.desc: Bloody sneakers and a purse found in a sleeping bag leads police to the body of a young woman. After collecting, sorting, and analyzing all sorts of evidence, it's a simple mark on the woman's body that will solve the case.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Hunter or Hunted?
programme.desc: A women is killed in the woods on the last day of hunting season, and police assume it was an accident until a suspicious letter arrives.

programme.title: Something's Killing Me: Forgotten But Fatal
programme.desc: Florida college student Lindsey Meyer and Michigan E.M.T Kevin Nesbit both come down with a painful sore throat. What seems like a symptom of the common cold, soon spirals into a life or death situation.

programme.title: Forensic Files: X Marks the Spot
programme.desc: Can a map tell who a serial killer really is?

programme.title: Forensic Files: Breaking the Mold
programme.desc: A family realizes that their health problems could be related to an uninvited 'guest.'

programme.title: Forensic Files: Deadly Matrimony
programme.desc: A young woman claims to need some time away on her own. After 20 years go by, her family begins to believe they will never know what happened to her, until one day they receive a phone call that will alter everything.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Grounds for Indictment
programme.desc: When police have trouble pinning a suspect to the scene of the crime in a deadly drive-by-shooting, even after investigating cell phone calls and shell casings, they turn to the dirt in the perpetrator's tires.

programme.desc: Florida college student Lindsey Meyer and Michigan E.M.T Kevin Nesbit both come down with a painful sore throat. What seems like a symptom of the common cold, soon spirals into a life or death situation.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Genghis Khan's Tomb
programme.desc: Josh journeys to Mongolia's 'forbidden zone' to find Genghis Khan's tomb.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: The Hunt for the Golden Owl
programme.desc: John Gates joins treasure hunters in the search for the Golden Owl, worth half a million dollars. A book of riddles gives cryptic clues as to where the Owl statuette is hidden.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Captain Kidd's Treasure
programme.desc: Josh retraces the footsteps of the legendary Captain Kidd in the hopes of finding his buried treasure. From the East Coast to the Caribbean, the search takes him to a real pirate shipwreck and to the island hideout of the notorious buccaneer.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Legend of the Crystal Skull
programme.desc: Josh heads to the jungles of Central America to investigate the legendary crystal skull that was discovered by a renowned adventurer who was the inspiration for Indiana Jones. Josh probes whether the skull is a lost relic or archaeology's tallest tale.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Secrets of Brother XII
programme.desc: Josh Gates attempts to uncover a treasure left behind by the Aquarian Foundation, an isolated, insidious cult led by the notorious leader known as Brother XII.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Rediscovered: Josh and the Secrets of Egypt
programme.desc: Josh heads to the Land of the Nile to uncover the secrets of Nefertiti, Cleopatra and more of ancient history's most powerful women. While there, he's also joining a famous archeologist who's about to discover the mummy of an ancient High Priest.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Rediscovered: Epic Search
programme.desc: Josh Gates embarks on an epic search for the Ark of the Covenant, following in the footsteps of Indiana Jones. Then, he heads into the Rocky Mountains in search of a $2 million treasure.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Tropical Paradise
programme.desc: A couple plans to build an oceanfront oasis for their family on the slopes of Maui, Hawaii. To keep the budget low, they design a Quonset hut which can be built cheaply and quickly, but unexpected setbacks test their limits at every turn.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Temple of Doom
programme.desc: Josh travels to the remote and landmine-riddled jungles of Cambodia to investigate the lost city of the Khmer Empire and search for a mystical relic that over 1,000 years ago gave its God King the power to incinerate his enemies.

programme.title: Project Grizzly: Into the Wild
programme.desc: Renowned bear handler Jeff Watson says goodbye to his family and friends and sets out on an adventure into the wilderness of Southern Indiana. Out there, he will teach his two 700lb grizzly bears Bob and Screech how to survive on their own in the wild.

programme.title: Project Grizzly: To Teach a Bear to Fish
programme.desc: Jeff releases his bears, Bob and Screech into the habitat where he begins his lifelong dream of re-wilding them. However the first lesson, fishing, proves more difficult than Jeff imagined and Bob appears to be falling behind Screech.

programme.title: Project Grizzly: What About Bob?
programme.desc: Jeff teaches the bears to forage in the wild, but Bob's foot is still a concern. When the bear slashes Jeff in the arm he refuses medical care. After he loses the bears, Jeff is forced to think about the difficulty of them actually leaving the nest.

programme.title: Project Grizzly: Bears on the Run
programme.desc: Jeff's unconventional hunting lessons fail to prepare Bob and Screech to hunt game in the wild, but he discovers they may be learning on their own. Meanwhile he reminisces about Grizzly Adams and agonizes over eventually parting ways with his bears.

programme.title: Project Grizzly: Teenage Bears
programme.desc: Jeff is pleased with Bob and Screech learning how to feed themselves. Now he teaches them how to den up for the winter. The grizzlies get territorial when Jeff's friend steps inside their habitat.

programme.title: Project Grizzly: Letting Go
programme.desc: As Jeff's rewilding journey with Bob and Screech nears the end, he has one painful lesson left to teach, how to fear man.

programme.title: Dual Survival: Winter Vortex: Part Two
programme.desc: Stranded in Wyoming's snowy mountains, Matt and Joe are threatened by hypothermia and predatory mountain lions. In frigid conditions, the pair takes their biggest risk yet by splitting up.

programme.title: Dual Survival: End of the Road
programme.desc: Stranded deep in the jungle of Vietnam, Joe and Matt take on a real world survival scenario in untamed terrain, but even their expertise can't change the fact that they're up against the hottest and most humid month of the year in South East Asia.

programme.title: Dual Survival: Mayan Mayhem
programme.desc: Trapped in a labyrinth of underground tunnels, Joe and Matt facedown darkness and risk drowning only to emerge on surface and find an inhospitable jungle. Their opposing approaches to survival pit them against one another before bringing them to rescue.

programme.title: Dual Survival: On the Edge
programme.desc: Lost on a perilous ridgeline, at 15,000 feet above sea level, Joe and Matt are forced to descend slippery cliffs through extreme weather conditions, where altitude sickness and hypothermia threaten, and life-preserving fire eludes them.

programme.title: Dual Survival: One Shot, One Kill

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: The Majority Rules

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Cleaning Out The Fridge
programme.desc: Ree Drummond is cleaning out her fridge and using up food that's on its way out. She's turning milk and cream into a wonderful lemon rice pudding with leftover lemons, while the produce drawer is transformed into a cool, delicious fridge gazpacho.

programme.title: 30 Minute Meals: There's No Crying in Carbonara!
programme.desc: Big lumps of crabmeat are the secret to Rachael's twist on pasta carbonara. Crab, celery, lemon and sherry create a bright flavour that balances rich, creamy egg yolks, fatty pancetta and sharp cheese.

programme.title: 30 Minute Meals: A Cutlet Above
programme.desc: Rachael reinvents the everyday pork cutlet with her thin and crispy fried pork Tonkatsu with shiso and savoy, topped with a sweet and tangy sauce.

programme.title: 30 Minute Meals: Tacos, Tacos, Tacos
programme.desc: Rachael is fired up for a smoking taco night with Mezcal shrimp tacos. Mezcal, fire-roasted tomatoes, paprika and chipotle in adobo bring smoky heat to counter a cool crema and juicy shrimp.

programme.title: 30 Minute Meals: Chicken Curry With Sriracha
programme.desc: Rachael's curry chicken chili with sriracha is a spicy change from the everyday. Ground chicken and smashes chickpeas are loaded with jalapeno, spices and a kick of sriracha. Rachael adds cool, creamy yogurt and zesty lime as a compliment.

programme.title: 30 Minute Meals: Mexi-mac Burgers and Waffle Fries With Taco Sauce
programme.desc: Rachael takes on the classic burger and fries combo and gives it a south-of-the-border twist. The secret is her mix of chorizo sausage and ground beef, as well as some spices to turn frozen waffle fries into a zesty side.

programme.title: 30 Minute Meals: Sichuan Steak au Poivre With Scallion Mashed Potatoes
programme.desc: Rachael turns up the flavour on a black pepper-covered steakhouse staple with her Sichuan steak au poivre with scallion mashed potatoes, which uses both Sichuan and traditional black peppercorns. Her side of creamy mashed potatoes round it out.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Thanksgiving

programme.title: Extinct or Alive: The Galapagos Giant
programme.desc: Forrest is in the Galapagos seeking the Fernandina Tortoise, an animal that was only seen once, over 100 years ago. The clues are here, along with an abundance of incredibly unique species, raising hopes of a historic discovery.

programme.title: Extinct or Alive: The Dracula Monkey of Borneo
programme.desc: Forrest returns to the volcanic islands of Indonesia to find the Millers Grizzled Langur, otherwise known as the Dracula monkey. When locals inform him of an illegal pet market, his search quickly evolves into a rescue mission.

programme.title: Extinct or Alive: The Legendary Cape Lion
programme.desc: Forrest ventures home to Zimbabwe in search of the mysterious Cape Lion, a massive black-maned predator. He and the crew navigate the African bush determined to get DNA proof, facing threats of charging rhinos and huge prides of lions.

programme.title: Extinct or Alive: The Caribbean Monk Seal
programme.desc: Forrest sets off on a dangerous, shark-infested search for the extinct Caribbean monk seal. To prove its existence, he and the crew descend into deep waters where they come face-to-face with a giant tiger shark.

programme.title: Extinct or Alive: Recovered Evidence: The Tasmanian Tiger Down Under
programme.desc: Featuring all-new footage from Forrest's expeditions. After numerous, credible eyewitness accounts of the Tasmanian Tiger in Australia, Forrest joins JCU researchers in their study before heading back into the Cape York Peninsula.

programme.title: Extinct or Alive: Madagascar Dwarf Hippo
programme.desc: Known for being a pint-size version of its African cousin, the Malagasy dwarf hippo has been written off as extinct for 1000 years. Forrest and a local biologist to trek through the bush of Madagascar to prove it still survives.

programme.title: Monster Squid: The Giant Is Real
programme.desc: Mankind finally confronts the creature of the deep as Science reveals the first ever footage of the giant squid where it lives.

programme.title: Extinct or Alive: Madagascar Dwarf Hippo
programme.desc: Known for being a pint-size version of its African cousin, the Malagasy dwarf hippo has been written off as extinct for 1000 years. Forrest and a local biologist to trek through the bush of Madagascar to prove it still survives.

programme.title: Extinct or Alive: Recovered Evidence: The Tasmanian Tiger Down Under
programme.desc: Featuring all-new footage from Forrest's expeditions. After numerous, credible eyewitness accounts of the Tasmanian Tiger in Australia, Forrest joins JCU researchers in their study before heading back into the Cape York Peninsula.

programme.title: Extinct or Alive: Madagascar Dwarf Hippo
programme.desc: Known for being a pint-size version of its African cousin, the Malagasy dwarf hippo has been written off as extinct for 1000 years. Forrest and a local biologist to trek through the bush of Madagascar to prove it still survives.

programme.title: The Crocodile Hunter: A Handful of Elephants
programme.desc: While exploring the jungle and rivers of Sumatra, Steve and Terri investigate the last remaining habitat of the endangered Indonesian elephant.

programme.title: Too Cute!: Roly-Poly Puppies
programme.desc: A shy puppy comes out of her shell with the help of her siblings. A trio of St. Bernard puppies follow their noses to big adventures. Also, an Airedale Terrier names Merlin tries to disappear from her eight brothers and sisters.

programme.title: My Cat From Hell: My Cat Ruined My Wedding
programme.desc: A couple is ready to take the next step, but Kay's cat is putting a wrench in their plans.

programme.title: The Aquarium: Penguins in Love
programme.desc: A staff member heads to the Marine Mammal Center in California to help in rehabilitation efforts of elephant seals. African penguins Charlie and Lizzie have been together for 25 years, and Charlie is having issues with his eyes. A piranha needs surgery.

programme.title: The Aquarium: Baby Otter Rescue
programme.desc: The team welcomes two rescued southern sea otter pups, Mara and Gibson, from the California coast. Young ruddy ducks arrive at the aquarium and are introduced to their new habitat. Nandi, the aquarium's smallest manta ray, is due for her annual checkup.

programme.title: The Aquarium: Dolphin Doctor
programme.desc: Polka, a bottlenose dolphin, has a raspy voice and needs to see the doctor to get the all-clear. Staff excitedly prepare for the upcoming puffin breeding season. Two woebegone sharks are due for a checkup. A curious and active box turtle goes for a walk.

programme.title: Give a Dog a Home: Live!
programme.desc: There are thousands of animals in shelters across the U.S. in need of good, loving homes. Now Animal Planet, with Best Friends Animal Society, wants to connect these animals directly to our viewers, live and in real time.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: The Dogs Who Made Us
programme.desc: This special episode takes a look at the dogs that will always hold a loving place in the family's hearts. From the first pit bull that Tia rescued to the dog that walked Tania down the aisle, family members share why each dog is so important to them.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: A Brother's Lifeline
programme.desc: A couple is torn between two dogs and can't decide which one to bring home. A terrified neighborhood stray in dire need of medical attention results in a difficult rescue for the VRC crew.

programme.title: Animals Gone Wild: Risking It All

programme.title: Animals Gone Wild: Wrong Place, Wrong Time

programme.title: Animals Gone Wild: Great Escapes
programme.desc: Check out these incredible stories of wild animals or terrified humans who are on a collision course. In each story, either an unsuspecting person or untamed creature finds themselves in a dangerous situation with a real and immediate need to escape.

programme.title: Wildest Arctic: Taiga: The Frozen Forest
programme.desc: Follow a year in the Taiga Forest, a frozen forest containing one third of the world's tree that spans right around the globe: across North America, Scandinavia, and extending across Siberia to the shores of the Pacific, sheltering majestic animals.

programme.title: Wildest Arctic: The Tundra: Desert of Ice
programme.desc: Covering 1/5th of the earth's surface, the arctic tundra is one of the coldest and driest places on the planet. The piercing sub-zero temperatures and powerful winds of the arctic tundra challenges even the hardiest of creatures.

programme.title: Wild Russia: East of Eden
programme.desc: For the animals living on Russia’s shores, survival is all about ingenuity.

programme.title: Underground Marvels: Cave of the Body Snatchers
programme.desc: An eerie system of underground vaults in Scotland was once the hideout for thieves who stole newly-buried bodies and sold them; today, experts are excavating these rubble-filled caves to reveal the secrets of what these bandits left behind.

programme.title: Engineering Catastrophes: Disaster in Vegas
programme.desc: Experts assess a giant sinkhole, a multi-million dollar road to nowhere, and a wind turbine on the brink of disaster, and determine if these engineering catastrophes can be repaired.

programme.title: Engineering Catastrophes: Stadium Disaster
programme.desc: A stadium on the brink of collapse, an upside-down bridge, and a massive subway project in crisis are engineering catastrophes in need of repair, and experts use cutting-edge technology to reveal if they can be fixed.

programme.title: Engineering Catastrophes: Highway to Hell
programme.desc: Investigating a skyscraper raining deadly bolts on the streets below, a highway on the brink of collapse, and a catastrophic landslide.

programme.title: Engineering Catastrophes: Nightmare in Florida
programme.desc: When a brand-new bridge suddenly collapses in Miami, several die in a horrifying calamity. Experts use the latest science to investigate what went wrong and how an innovative bridge-building technique could be to blame.

programme.title: Engineering Catastrophes: Boston's Big Dig Disaster
programme.desc: Boston's Big Dig was one of the most ambitious engineering projects in history, but in 2006, a fatal collapse in one of its tunnels put the ambitious project in doubt; experts reveal what caused this engineering disaster and how it was fixed.

programme.title: Deadly Engineering: When Katrina Struck
programme.desc: Hurricane Katrina is one of the worst natural disasters to ever strike American soil, but as the storm revealed widespread construction failures, it's a tragedy of engineering, too; the latest science reveals how.

programme.desc: An airport that's sinking into the sea, a strange tower that goes wrong, and a dangerous bridge in Venice are engineering catastrophes in need of repair, and experts use cutting-edge technology to reveal if they can be fixed.

programme.desc: Engineering catastrophes include a giant tunnel boring machine stuck underground, a village sinking into a mountain, and massive holes that could derail a train.

programme.desc: A mother is gunned down next to her toddler, sparking a homicide investigation involving passion, kidnapping and intimidation. When cops discover a dictatphone, it leads them on the trail of intimate audio recordings that could prove reveal her killer.

programme.title: Web of Lies: Dangerous Games
programme.desc: Brilliant schoolboy Breck Bednar has a passion for computers and gaming. But when he's introduced to a successful entrepreneur online, passion turns to obsession and the game becomes deadly.

programme.title: Web of Lies: Too Fast, Too Young
programme.desc: After a troubled childhood, 13-year old Christina Long's life seems to be on the up and up. Now living with her beloved Aunt Shelly, Christina is a popular honor student and cheerleader. But when her online life is revealed, it tells a more tragic story.

programme.title: Web of Lies: Swipe Right for Murder
programme.desc: When Ashley Pegram goes missing after meeting a man through a dating app, the race to find her focuses on her internet admirer. Detectives soon discover she is caught up in a nightmarish trap set by an online predator with murder on his mind.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Defending DJ
programme.desc: '48 Hours' takes viewers back to October 17, 2010 when Danroy 'DJ' Henry, a university football player, was shot dead by police officer Aaron Hess. That event triggered a seven-year journey for DJ’s family as they searched for answers.

programme.title: 48 Hours Mystery: Death of a Dream
programme.desc: An aspiring Broadway dancer is murdered; did her secrets contribute to her death? Correspondent Erin Moriarty reports.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Cold-Blooded Killer
programme.desc: A father goes hunting in a Florida lake and vanishes. Many people thought he was eaten by alligators, but not his mother. Seventeen years later, a stunning confession proves she was right all along.

programme.title: See No Evil: Vanished at Noon
programme.desc: On November 26th, 2014, Jessica Padgett disappears. The only lead is her abandoned white Subaru. Surveillance cameras show her driving into a parking lot and walking down a back alley, never to return.

programme.title: See No Evil: Someone to Watch Over Her
programme.desc: On a freezing winter night, a hardworking mother doesn't make it home from work. As dawn breaks, her body is found in a churchyard. With the city in panic, Police turn to the city's surveillance cameras... hoping they can help catch a brutal murderer.

programme.title: See No Evil: Maurice's Last Visitor
programme.desc: On December 10th, 2011, Maurice Byrd is found dead in his home with multiple gunshot wounds. Security footage from a neighboring church reveals that prior to his body being discovered, Maurice had many visitors.

programme.title: See No Evil: Breakdown at Daylight
programme.desc: 17-year old Casey Crowder vanished early one Sunday morning after her car ran out of gas outside of Dumas, Arkansas. With no leads and no witnesses, investigators are desperate to find any CCTV cameras that can lead them to the missing teen.

programme.title: American Titans: Daly vs. Clark
programme.desc: The lawless territory of 1880's Montana remains up for grabs. Two relentless American Titans, William Clark and Marcus Daly, find themselves in a war to control power over the state and to mine millions in copper ore hidden in the 'richest hill on earth.'

programme.title: American Titans: Vanderbilt vs. Drew
programme.desc: Railroad kingpin Cornelius Vanderbilt takes on his old friend Daniel Drew in a Wall Street war for the Erie Railroad. Vanderbilt has millions, but sly Drew and his protégés, Jay Gould and Jim Fisk, are set to break the bank of America's biggest tycoon.

programme.title: American Titans: Carnegie vs. Frick
programme.desc: Steel magnate Andrew Carnegie and coal king Henry Clay Frick join forces to dominate America's second industrial revolution. Their wealthy empire will crush rivals, destroy the labor movement, and ignite a bitter feud between titans that ends in violence.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: Bonus Round: Engineering America
programme.desc: Learn the truth behind the myths that surround our most revered patriotic symbols and we unveil the surprising facts of two great feats of engineering: the Panama Canal and the Transcontinental Railroad.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: Bonus Round: Fall into the Truth
programme.desc: On this special edition of America: Facts vs. Fiction, we expose the truth behind some of our favorite Fall holidays: Thanksgiving and Halloween.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: Bonus Round: Saluting the Truth
programme.desc: On this special edition of America: Facts vs. Fiction, we reveal the startling truth of two legendary generals, George Patton and Ulysses S. Grant. You'll also get a reality check on the roaring twenties and lawless thirties.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: All-American Landmarks
programme.desc: On this special edition of America: Facts vs. Fiction, discover the real truth behind some of America's greatest landmarks.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: Bonus Round: Striking it Rich
programme.desc: Discover the real facts behind America's biggest economic boom and biggest bust, and learn the truth behind some of Las Vegas' greatest myths.

programme.title: American Titans: Carnegie vs. Frick
programme.desc: Steel magnate Andrew Carnegie and coal king Henry Clay Frick join forces to dominate America's second industrial revolution. Their wealthy empire will crush rivals, destroy the labor movement, and ignite a bitter feud between titans that ends in violence.

programme.title: Apocalypse: Stalin
programme.desc: In 1941, Hitler has thrown himself into a fight to the death against Stalin. Two decades earlier, in 1917, Joseph Jughashvili from Georgia is a member of Lenin's Bolshevik Party, who has just seized power in Russia. The country is torn by civil war.

programme.title: Apocalypse: Stalin
programme.desc: After blocking the Germans right outside of Moscow, Stalin now faces Hitler's second assault. The world's fate will be decided in Stalingrad. Like in Leningrad, men, women, and children are plunged into hell and sacrificed.

programme.title: Apocalypse: Stalin
programme.desc: The Soviets continue on the path to towards liberation. On the road to Berlin, they discover the horror of Hitler's extermination camps. Fifteen years earlier, Stalin transformed his country using every means at his disposal.

programme.title: Project Nazi: The Blueprints of Evil: A Culture of Control
programme.desc: Hitler is determined to change the way German people think and feel by creating a new, Nazi form of art and culture. He takes over the film industry and radio stations, giving the Nazis complete control over every image and message his people receive.

programme.title: Project Nazi: The Blueprints of Evil: Himmler's Empire of Terror
programme.desc: Hitler's bid for power depends on his most loyal, and violent supporters: the SS. Using surveillance, detention, and even murder, they defeat political enemies and are most responsible for putting Hitler's deadly policy of racial purity into practice.

programme.title: Project Nazi: The Blueprints of Evil: Retreat from Reality
programme.desc: Adolf Hitler is determined to fight to the very end, even if it costs millions of Germans their lives. He puts his faith in his the 'Wunderwaffe' and the 'wonder weapons,' including the first ever ballistic missile, the V2.

programme.title: FutureWeapons: Guns
programme.desc: A rapid-fire cannon that's becoming a hit with the US military; the personal defence weapon that has the same knockdown as bigger guns, the Gatling gun that rains fire on target and the new multi-calibre assault weapon.

programme.title: FutureWeapons: Future Warrior
programme.desc: An assault riffle that can be converted into a sniper riffle is examined.

programme.title: Triggers: Weapons That Changed the World: Gatling and the A-10
programme.desc: The aerial Gatling gun has the highest rate of fire of any military machine gun in the world. Host Wil Willis flies in an F16 to see the six thousand round a minute Vulcan rip apart targets and fires the minigun from a helicopter at exploding cars.

programme.title: Triggers: Weapons That Changed the World: The Abrams Tank
programme.desc: The M1 Abrams tank is the world's most potent armored vehicle. Track its development through such forerunners as the WWII-era M18 Hellcat and the Cold War-era Soviet T-55 tank and see why these 'beast-boxes' have ruled ground warfare for decades.

programme.title: Holmes Makes It Right: Log Jam
programme.desc: Mark hires a family friend to build a custom log house for him to retire in. The budget has been maxed out and the home isn’t done, so he sends out an SOS that Mike Holmes answers.

programme.title: Holmes Makes It Right: Money for Nothing
programme.desc: After a contractor holds Laura and Greg's new kitchen hostage for four months, even threatening to put a lien on their home, the desperate couple turn to the one contractor they can trust.

programme.title: Holmes Makes It Right: Retooled: To Mike, From Aggie
programme.desc: A nurse who works countless hours at a brain injury center is too busy supporting her family to fix the many problems in her new house. Her mother-in-law Aggie is so desperate to help she delivers a letter straight to Mike's mailbox.

programme.title: Holmes Makes It Right: Urea Got Me
programme.desc: Mike gets called to a house recently retrofitted with a substance that’s been banned in Canada for decades.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: Unfinished Business
programme.desc: Mike and the crew start a new home that was left half-finished by a contractor and find tons of problems behind the walls. Michael and designer Kimm go shopping for flooring with some furry friends, and Sherry and Cali take baby steps getting to work.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: Healthy Holmes
programme.desc: Mike Holmes helps his son renovate his home so he and his girlfriend can start a family.

programme.title: Holmes: Next Generation: One Good Deed Deserves Another
programme.desc: A woman who lost her husband, the neighborhood 'Good Samaritan,' needs help completing many of the DIY projects he had started around the house. So Next Generation is stepping in, and stepping up, to 'Make Things Right' for the widow.

programme.title: Holmes: Next Generation: Far From Home
programme.desc: A couple relocating to a different part of the city needs help updating their kitchen before putting their house on the market. After a local contractor let them down and drained their budget, Next Generation swoops in to 'make things right.'

programme.title: Docked Out: Driftwood Dock: Custom Waterfront Living
programme.desc: The crew builds a massive two-storey dock that incorporates elements of the existing home and the river itself. The crew also builds a swim step, one-of-a-kind furniture made from driftwood pieces and a custom upper level with a view.

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Mega Decks: A Spacious Retreat With Artistic Details
programme.desc: The Mega team overhauls an ugly, exposed and downright dangerous deck disaster. They face challenging weather, rotting wood and even an infestation while transforming two separate and unusable spaces into a sprawling, year-round retreat.

programme.title: Mega Decks: A Triple Threat Deck With a Pool
programme.desc: The team builds their biggest and most expensive masterpiece over four months on a $750,000 budget. Big problems start after finishing the deck, when freezing temperatures put an indefinite hold on finishing the pool.

programme.title: Mega Decks: An Entertainment Mecca With Glass Walls
programme.desc: The team transforms a useless, small, and shabby two-level deck into a double decker party zone with all the familiarities of home. Included are 18-foot high ceilings, 11-foot tall glass panels, and more audio and visual elements they've ever added.

programme.title: Mega Decks: Dream Deck With a Cozy Feel
programme.desc: Garth and the team face a huge challenge transforming a rickety, unsafe deck into a two-story masterpiece with a stone kitchen and bar, fire and water features and a spiral staircase.

programme.title: Mega Decks: All-New Deck For Repeat Client
programme.desc: A former Mega Decks customer buys a new house and needs a new deck. Find out if Andy and the build crew can live up to the client's heightened expectations and deliver a second mega deck that beats the first.

programme.title: Mega Decks: Building Bigger In Texas
programme.desc: Garth travels to the Lone Star State to build its first mega deck. Garth unifies a disjointed patio, doubling the floor space and quadrupling the covered living area. The $325,000 deck is finished with fire pits, a swim spa and a mesquite bar top.

programme.title: Mega Decks: Colorado Contemporary Deck
programme.desc: The crew has a $350,000 budget for a contemporary-style mega deck with a curved hand-cut stone fireplace, a pergola and a pizza oven. Building outdoors in winter subjects the crew to dangerous icy conditions and an oversight threatens the pergola build.

programme.title: Mega Decks: Dramatic Cliffside Triple Deck
programme.desc: Transforming this home's 20 year old deck into a mega deck requires a complete demo and rebuild. Plans include redoing a kids' play deck and a master bedroom deck. The challenge is that the property sits on the side of a cliff with a 40 foot drop.

programme.title: Mega Decks: In Garth We Trust
programme.desc: A half-finished deck means a call for Garth to deliver the deck of one couples dreams. But to make their dream work, he needs to cut down a few trees, which the owners are unsure of.

programme.title: Mega Decks: Log Cabin Luxe
programme.desc: To help this tiny deck achieve mega status, massive 40-foot-long Western red cedar logs are trucked in from Canada. The finished product has a three-tier pizza oven, a six-foot gas fire rail, and extra tall glass panels.

programme.title: Mega Decks: An Ideal Family Deck With a Wood-Burning Fireplace
programme.desc: Randy and Kim want a place for their kids to hang out with their friends, as well as a place to connect and bond as a family, so they've decided to turn their old patio into a family party deck.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: A Yellow and Brown Mess
programme.desc: Nicole finds another house in an up and coming neighbourhood that needs her attention. Fighting the onset of colder weather, she must first tackle an exterior makeover, replacing the icky yellow and brown paint job.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Breaking the Woodwork Rules
programme.desc: Nicole begins work on the interior of the Case Ave house and is faced with a living and dining room full of gorgeous woodwork and original pocket doors that have been painted over the years.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Five-Star Foyer
programme.desc: Nicole takes the dark and dim front entryway and opens it up, removing soffits, repairing original stained glass windows, and hunting for salvaged parts to rebuild the fabulous staircase.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Sensational Second Floor
programme.desc: The bedrooms and bathroom on the second floor desperately need Nicole's attention. She must deal with water-damaged walls, old carpet and vinyl covering the hardwood, and a tiny, dirty bathroom that needs an updated shower.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Kitchen Breakthrough
programme.desc: The Case Ave house is almost complete, and Nicole has saved the most difficult task for last - figuring out a functional layout for the cramped kitchen.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Front Porch Frenzy
programme.desc: Adam and Rachael hire Nicole to fully restore their newly purchased 1920s house. The couple is getting married and need to move into the home in a month, so Nicole must work faster than ever to complete everything on time.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Living Room Overhaul
programme.desc: Continuing her restoration of Adam and Rachael's home, Nicole moves her attention to the living room, where she must restore the beat up hardwood floors.

programme.title: Cheap Eats: Hungry In The Jax
programme.desc: Ali Khan is hunting for the best deals in Jacksonville, Fla., for breakfast, lunch, dinner and a snack. He kicks off his culinary escapades with a chef-driven dish of chorizo corn cakes with vegan queso and spicy guajillo chile sauce.

programme.title: Cheap Eats: Sweet Deals Down South
programme.desc: Ali Khan has only 35 bucks to find the best deals in Savannah, Ga., for breakfast, lunch, dinner, and a snack!
